OutputSettings.GenerateSpoilerLog.tooltip:
Output a spoiler log.

The spoiler log contains a list over all items, and their shuffled locations.
In addition, the spoiler log contains version information, seed and settings string used in the randomization.

Web.wad_file.tooltip: Your original MM 1.2 NTSC-U / NTSC-J WAD file (.wad)

Web.common_key_file.tooltip:
The Wii Common Key is a copyrighted 32 character string needed for WAD encryption.
Google to find it! Do not ask on Discord!

Web.common_key_string.tooltip:
The Wii Common Key is a copyrighted 32 character string needed for WAD encryption.
Google to find it! Do not ask on Discord!

Web.wad_channel_id.tooltip:
4 characters, should end with E to ensure Dolphin compatibility.
Note: If you have multiple MMR WAD files with different Channel IDs installed, the game can crash on a soft reset. Use a Title Deleter to remove old WADs.

Web.presets.tooltip:
Select a setting preset to apply. You can also save your own presets to use at a later date.
Available Presets:
Season 6:
The competitive settings for MMR Standard Season 6.

Blitz:
Blitz Settings - meant for highly competitive play and short seeds.

Allsanity (in 3 different variants):
The hardest settings you can imagine. Everything is enabled, and different requirements make the difference. Use this if you want to test your limits and how deep your MM knowledge reaches.

Advanced:
A challenge for those who want to prove their knowhow of glitches and strats. These settings expect you to get your items in unorthodox ways more often than not, and hints and mechanics might be more complex than you are used to.

Classic:
Classic MMR Racing settings improved with modern conveniences. Relive season 1/2 settings with a twist.

Modern:
The competitive settings for the previous MMR Standard season, but without a random starting mask.

SG Live 2025:
The competitive settings for the SG Live 2025 tournament.

preset_section.subheader:
Presets are settings that can be saved and loaded from.
Loading a preset will overwrite all settings that affect the seed.

GameplaySettings.LogicMode.tooltip:
Select mode of logic:
- Casual: The randomization logic ensures that the game can be beaten casually.
- Glitched: The randomization logic allows for placement of items that are only obtainable using known glitches.
- Vanilla Layout: All items are left vanilla.
- User Logic: Upload your own custom logic to be used in the randomization.
- No Logic: Completely random, no guarantee the game is beatable. Uses Glitched logic with all tricks enabled for HTML tracker and Blitz junk location calculation.

GameplaySettings.UserLogicFileName.tooltip: Path to a custom logic file.

GameplaySettings.ItemPlacement.tooltip: Select the order that items are placed. If you don't know what this does, just use Random.

default: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth

Lensless Chests.tooltip:
Open invisible chests without the Lens of Truth; there is one in Lens Cave, Mountain Village,
and Beneath the Well.

Powder Kegs as Explosives.tooltip:
Use Powder Kegs in place of other explosives, for ALL applications of explosives,
including other tricks.

Blast Mask Long Jumps As Zora/FD.text: Blast Mask Long Jumps As Zora/FD
Blast Mask Long Jumps As Zora/FD.tooltip: You may be expected to perform long jumps that require Zora or Fierce Deity Link using Blast Mask.

Skull Kid With Bombs.tooltip: Hit the Ocarina out of Skull Kid's hand with a well-timed bomb throw.

Skull Kid With Blast Mask.tooltip: Hit the Ocarina out of Skull Kid's hand with a back flip and a Blast Mask explosion.

Skull Kid With FD.tooltip: Hit the Ocarina out of Skull Kid's hand with a Fierce Deity Link jump slash.

Straw Roof With Jump Slash.tooltip: Use a precise jump slash to upwarp on top of the straw roof in South Clock Town for the chest.

Straw Roof as FD.tooltip: Jump to the lower chest in South Clock Town as Fierce Deity Link.

South Clock Town Final Day Chest as FD.text: South Clock Town Final Day Chest as FD
South Clock Town Final Day Chest as FD.tooltip: Jump to the upper chest in South Clock Town as Fierce Deity Link.

Straw Roof as Goron.tooltip:
Goron Pound underneath the corner of the straw roof to upwarp on top of it,
then jump to the chest as human link.

Clock Tower Clock With Sword Beams.text: Clock Tower Clock With Sword Beams
Clock Tower Clock With Sword Beams.tooltip:
Hit the Clock Tower clock with a Sword Beam for its items, aiming using the nearby dog to angle the
beam upward.

Clock Tower Clock With Powder Keg.text: Clock Tower Clock With Powder Keg
Clock Tower Clock With Powder Keg.tooltip: Hit the Clock Tower clock for its items by throwing a Powder Keg at it.

Clock Tower Clock With Bombchu.tooltip: Hit the Clock Tower clock for its items using a very, very precise Bombchu.

Jump Slash Tingle Balloon.tooltip: Jump from the tree, and jump slash Tingle's balloon with a sword to take him down.

Keaton Grass Small Spin.tooltip: Hit more than 5 Keaton bushes with a small sword and quick spin attacks.

Deku Playground Rupee Displacement.tooltip:
Make the Rupees in Deku Playground fall by repeatedly using transformation masks, trade items,
or the Ocarina of Time.

Deku Playground as FD.tooltip:
Get on top of the platforms in the Deku Playground during Day 2 or 3 with a well timed jump as
Fierce Deity.

Deku Playground as Goron.tooltip:
Get on top of the platforms in the Deku Playground during Day 2 or 3 with a well timed roll as
Goron.

Deku Playground with Goron Spikes.tooltip:
Get on top of the platforms in the Deku Playground during Day 1 with a very precisely timed and
aimed Goron Spike Roll.

Bomber Guard Skip.tooltip: Backflip over the Bomber Hideout Guard.

Inn Balcony Jump.tooltip: Jump to the Inn balcony as Zora or Adult Link.

Inn Balcony With Cucco.tooltip: Use a Cucco from the Bombers' Hide and Seek to jump to the Stock Pot Inn balcony.

Inn Balcony With Bombs.tooltip: Long jump or recoil flip into Stock Pot Inn with explosives.

Inn Balcony as Goron.tooltip: Goron Spike Roll into Stock Pot Inn at night for Midnight Meeting. Requires a special setup.

Inn Balcony With Nothing.tooltip: Simply wait on the balcony after 8:30 PM to speak to Anju during the Midnight Meeting.

Postman without Bunny Hood.tooltip: Get exactly 10 seconds without using the Bunny Hood.

Bank #2 Without Wallets.tooltip: Bank Reward #2 will not require Adult Wallet or higher.

Bank #3 Without Wallets.tooltip: Bank Reward #3 will not require Giant Wallet or higher.

Bio Baba Hive Luck.tooltip: Hope the item lands on a lilypad.

Great Bay Early With Goron Bomb Jump.text: Great Bay Early With Goron Bomb Jump
Great Bay Early With Goron Bomb Jump.tooltip: Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair to get past the fence blocking Great Bay.

Great Bay Early With Goron Chu Chu Jump.text: Great Bay Early With Goron Chu Chu Jump
Great Bay Early With Goron Chu Chu Jump.tooltip: Lure a Chu Chu over to the Great Bay fence to damage boost over the fence as Goron.

Great Bay Early as FD.tooltip: Long jump over the fence as Fierce Deity with a well-timed jump slash.

Great Bay Early With Only Bombs.text: Great Bay Early With Only Bombs
Great Bay Early With Only Bombs.tooltip:
Long jump, jump slash, damage boost using 2 bombs to get over the fence to Great Bay as just Human
Link.

Observatory Goron Bomb Jump.tooltip: Goron bomb jump over the Astral Observatory fence.

Peahat With Sticks.tooltip: Kill the Peahat in Termina Field with Deku Sticks. A broken Deku Stick is preferable.

Dodongos With Sticks.tooltip: Kill the Dodongos in Termina Field with Deku Sticks. A broken Deku Stick is preferable.

Takkuri With Nothing.tooltip:
Kill Takkuri with Deku Sticks, or if even Deku Sticks are too hard to come by,
throwing a total of 12 grass at Takkuri will take him down too!

Bio Baba Grotto With Bombs.tooltip: Destroy the hives in the Bio Baba grotto in Termina Field with explosives.

Termina Field Log Climb.tooltip:
Climb up one of the ends of the log to get the item above the log with the gimmick Climb Most
Surfaces.

North Ramp Jump.tooltip:
Jump to the invisible item in the gap between the two ramps in northern Termina Field.
Requires either a precise long jump+jump slash combo, or a roll jump as a tall form plus a jump
slash.

Termina Field Clam With Explosives.tooltip: Hit the clam for its items with a Bombchu, or throw explosives at it.

Termina Field Clam With Sword Beams.text: Termina Field Clam With Sword Beams
Termina Field Clam With Sword Beams.tooltip: Angle a Sword Beam at the clam in Termina Field using clever targeting of a nearby Chu Chu.

Pillar Pot as FD.tooltip: Jump to the pot and jump slash it as Fierce Deity.

Pillar Pot With Bombchu.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Pillar Pot With Explosives.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside by throwing an explosive at it as Goron/Adult Link.

Pillar Pot With Nothing.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside by luring a Real Bombchu into it.

Stump Chest With Goron Bomb Jump.text: Stump Chest With Goron Bomb Jump
Stump Chest With Goron Bomb Jump.tooltip: Damage boost on top of the stump in Termina Field with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Stump Chest With Goron Spikes.tooltip:
Perform a precise Goron Spike Roll to take a jump off one of the roots of the stump to get on top
of the stump.

Underwater Chest as Giant.tooltip: Open the chest as Giant from a precise position.

Avoid Swamp Tree Bat.tooltip: Kill the other bats, then climb around the final bat with precision.

Road to Swamp Bats With Sticks.text: Road to Swamp Bats With Sticks
Road to Swamp Bats With Sticks.tooltip: Kill the 3 bats guarding the Heart Piece in the tree with sticks or by throwing grass.

Swamp Tingle as FD.tooltip: Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity from the top of the tree.

Run Through Poisoned Water.tooltip: Run through the poison swamp as Zora/FD/Adult/Giant Link.

Poisoned Water as Goron.tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by rolling as Goron. You aren't guaranteed to have enough health to make it.

Lilypad Parkour as FD.tooltip:
Go through the poison swamp to Deku Palace, and even the soft soil outside Deku Palace,
as Fierce Deity, without taking any damage!

Big Octo Skip as Deku.tooltip:
The glitchless Octo skip, for the Octo near the frog. Jump to the left side of the Big Octo,
and sneak past it as Deku with void I-frames.

Big Octo Skip as Goron.tooltip: Roll from the Tourist Center ledge through the Big Octo as Goron Link.

Big Octo Skip as FD.tooltip: Simply jump over the Big Octo as Fierce Deity Link.

Big Octo Skip as Adult Link.text: Big Octo Skip as Adult Link
Big Octo Skip as Adult Link.tooltip: Recoil flip over the Big Octo near the Tourist Center.

Swamp Poison Water by Climbing.tooltip: Kill the Big Octo, and climb around the poison swamp with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Recoil Flip to Swamp Spiderhouse with Fa.text: Recoil Flip to Swamp Spiderhouse with Fairy
Recoil Flip to Swamp Spiderhouse with Fa.tooltip:
From the Tourist Center platform, recoil flip over the Big Octo, and swim through the poison swamp
as human Link. A fairy is likely necessary to survive the damage.

Poison Swamp Grotto as Goron.tooltip:
Get from the Swamp Spiderhouse to the grotto nearby with either a long jump,
or a Goron Pound damage boost off a nearby Dragonfly.

Long Jump to Soaring Tablet.tooltip:
Backflip onto the lilypad near the large rock, and jump to the rock.
Then, you can long jump from near the Deku Flower to the Song of Soaring tablet as Zora/Adult/FD.

FD Jump to Soaring Tablet.tooltip:
FD jump from near the Deku Flower to the Song of Soaring tablet.
Sliding off without jumping is very common, but avoidable.

Tourist Center Roof as Goron.tooltip: Simply Goron Pound underneath the Tourist Center door to warp up on top of the roof.

Tourist Center Roof as FD.tooltip:
Either sidehop into the door as Fierce Deity Link to get a strange upwarp on top of the roof,
or use a FD Gainer.

Swamp Frog Item Long Jump.tooltip: Long jump to the blue rupees with explosives.

Swamp Frog Items as Goron.tooltip:
Damage boost off an Octorok projectile as Goron to get the blue rupees on top of the flowers near
the swamp frog.

Near Frog Hive Flower as Human.text: Near Frog Hive Flower as Human
Near Frog Hive Flower as Human.tooltip:
Climb onto the giant flower near this beehive as only Human to reach it with Hookshot or a Bombchu.
You can do a glitchy upwarp onto the flower from the water where the petals of the flower are as
low as they can be.

Near Frog Hive With Bombchu.tooltip: Destroy this beehive with a well-placed, well-timed Bombchu.

SSH With Bombchu.tooltip: Destroy beehives in Swamp Spider House with Bombchu.

SSH Main Room Ceiling Skull as FD.text: SSH Main Room Ceiling Skull as FD
SSH Main Room Ceiling Skull as FD.tooltip: Kill the skull from a distance, then jump to the token as Fierce Deity Link.

SSH With Explosives.tooltip: Kill Swamp Skulltulas and break beehives by throwing explosives at them.

SSH Gold Room as FD.tooltip:
Jump and climb on top of the left "support pillar" as Fierce Deity to access the beehive and the
Skulltula near the ceiling.

SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull as FD.text: SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull as FD
SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull as FD.tooltip: Jump to the skull from the scaffolding as Fierce Deity.

SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull With.text: SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull With Nothing
SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull With.tooltip:
Jump slash to kill the skull, then jump slash to collect the skull, using two precise anti-gravity
jumps from the top of the monument, on the lower side.

SSH Vine Skull as Zora.tooltip: Collect the skull behind the vine through the wall with Zora Fins.

SSH With Blast Mask and Climbing.text: SSH With Blast Mask and Climbing
SSH With Blast Mask and Climbing.tooltip: Blast some beehives and wall skulls with Blast Mask and the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

SSH Boulderless-less.tooltip: Put bugs in the boulder soft soil spot without actually destroying the boulder.

SSH Tree Room Beehive as FD.text: SSH Tree Room Beehive as FD
SSH Tree Room Beehive as FD.tooltip:
Blow up the Gossip Stone in the tree room, then use the blast-off animation of the Gossip Stone to
get an angle to hit the beehive with a Sword Beam.

Deku Guard Skip.tooltip: Backflip over the deku guards from the fence.

Kill Deku Shrine Big Octo.tooltip:
Kill the Big Octo blocking the Deku Shrine before clearing Woodfall Temple with the Bow, Hookshot,
or Zora Mask.

Deku Palace Bean Skip.tooltip: Backflip onto the gate, then jump to the fence.

Deku Palace Poison Water Without Deku Ma.text: Deku Palace Poison Water Without Deku Mask
Deku Palace Poison Water Without Deku Ma.tooltip:
Run through the damaging water to the soft soil outside Deku Palace as a non-human form,
taking a lot of damage in the process.

Collect Out of Bounds Item.tooltip:
Grab the out of bounds item near the entrance to the imprisoned monkey in Deku Palace with a Zora
Boomerang through the wall.

Deku Palace Pots as Goron.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump up to the pots.

Deku Palace Pots as Goron With Nothing.text: Deku Palace Pots as Goron With Nothing
Deku Palace Pots as Goron With Nothing.tooltip:
Wake up a Deku Scrub by backflipping on the Bean Skip door frame, then damage boost up to the Deku
Palace pots as Goron off the nuts fired by the Deku Scrub.

Bean Grotto as Giant.tooltip:
Put on Giant's Mask underneath the chest on the ledge in Bean Man's grotto to get warped up onto
the ledge.

Woodfall as FD.tooltip:
Jump from the Song of Soaring tablet to the entrance of Woodfall, and collect all the items in
Woodfall with clever platforming as Fierce Deity Link.

Woodfall Climbing and Swimming.tooltip:
After climbing up to Woodfall with the Climb Anywhere Gimmick, you may be expected to do quite a
bit of swimming in the poison water as Human Link.

Woodfall Blue Rupee Without Deku Mask.text: Woodfall Blue Rupee Without Deku Mask
Woodfall Blue Rupee Without Deku Mask.tooltip:
A long jump or recoil flip with explosives will work, but you can also recoil flip off a deku scrub
projectile to get this.

WFT 2nd Floor With Hookshot.tooltip: Hookshot the torch on the right side of the main room, and jump up.

WFT Bow Skip.tooltip: Open the barred doors leading to the pre-boss room of Woodfall Temple with a lit Deku Stick.

Jump Slash WFT Gekko.tooltip:
Manipulate where the Gekko will fall off his Snapper, and jump slash it when it tries to climb the
wall.

Dinolfos With Sticks.tooltip: Kill the Dinolfos in Woodfall Temple with a Deku Stick(s).

WFT Skulltula With Stick.tooltip: Kill the Skulltula holding a Stray Fairy in Woodfall Temple with a Deku Stick.

WFT Entrance as FD.tooltip: Jump along the platforms to get through the first room as Fierce Deity.

WFT 2nd Floor as FD.tooltip:
Jump from the Stray Fairy chest spawn in the main room to the 2nd floor as Fierce Deity with
egregious precision.

WFT Elevator Room as FD.tooltip:
Jump from the 2nd floor to the room with the Gekko as Fierce Deity, and also jump around the
elevator room in general.

WFT Elevator Jump.tooltip: Use the eye switch elevator without Deku Mask to get to the 2nd floor.

WFT as Giant Link.tooltip:
Backflip through the first room, jump to the 2nd floor, jump to the Gekko door,
and jump to the Odolwa door, all as Giant Link.

WFT Jump Slash to 2nd Floor.tooltip:
Above the main room, perform a jump slash recoil through one of the holes to obtain access to the
main room's 2nd floor.

WFT Carnivorous Flower Jump.tooltip: Kill the carnivorous flower outside the Snapper room, then jump from the flower to the Snapper room.

WFT Elevator Room Long Jumps.tooltip:
Long jump to the Small Key chest from the top floor, and long jump to the Snapper room from the
elevator.

WFT Long Jump to Odolwa as FD.text: WFT Long Jump to Odolwa as FD
WFT Long Jump to Odolwa as FD.tooltip:
In the pre-boss room, jump to the flower platform on the right, then long jump to the Red Rupee on
the right with explosives and Fierce Deity to get to Odolwa's lair.

WFT Odolwa With Nothing.tooltip: Defeat Odolwa with only Bomb Flowers.

WFT Pre-Boss Jumps to Upper Left.text: WFT Pre-Boss Jumps to Upper Left
WFT Pre-Boss Jumps to Upper Left.tooltip:
Jump and climb up the ledges leading to the upper left Stray Fairy bubble as Zora/Adult/Fierce
Deity Link.

WFT Stray Fairy Bubbles With Explosives.text: WFT Stray Fairy Bubbles With Explosives
WFT Stray Fairy Bubbles With Explosives.tooltip:
Pop Stray Fairy bubbles with explosives and Bombchu, for the purpose of collecting them with Great
Fairy's Mask.

WFT Poison Water Bubble With Nothing.text: WFT Poison Water Bubble With Nothing
WFT Poison Water Bubble With Nothing.tooltip:
Grab the fairy by swimming in the poison water. It is theoretically possible to not have enough
health to do this!

WFT Main Room Switch Jump.tooltip: Jump to the switch from the 2nd floor with a roll jump as human.

WFT Entrance Platform With Explosives.tooltip:
Use a precise Long Jump to the platform with the chest in the first room.
Aim for the Deku Flower to not fall down.

WFT Hives With Explosives.tooltip: Destroy hives in Woodfall Temple with explosives and Bombchu for their items.

WFT Entrance Hive With Jump Slash.text: WFT Entrance Hive With Jump Slash
WFT Entrance Hive With Jump Slash.tooltip: Break the beehive in the first room of Woodfall Temple with a sword and a jump slash.

WFT Entrance Hive Jumps.tooltip:
Long jump to the platform nearest the hive. Also, Adult Link can barely make it there with a
precise jump + jump slash.

WFT Red Rupee Jumps.tooltip:
Jump to the red rupees on the pillars in the room leading up to Odolwa.
Can be done with either a Long Jump with explosives, Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere,
or clever use of Ice Arrow platforms.

WFT Red Rupees as Goron.tooltip:
From the door to Odolwa, roll straight into the pillar as Goron, and the red rupee will somehow be
collected.

WFT Crystal Long Jump.tooltip:
Long jump to the crystal switch in the room before Odolwa. You will only ever possibly need to do
this to collect the red rupee on the right hand side of the room.

Lensless Climbing.tooltip: Climb the Mountain Village invisible ladder without Lens of Truth.

Snowball Skip With Tall Character.tooltip:
Avoid the large snowballs in Path to Mountain Village with a Zora/Adult Link backflip or a somewhat
precise backwalk as Fierce Deity.

Snowball Skip as Human.tooltip: Backflip over the large snowballs blocking the way to Mountain Village as only Link.

Smithy Fairy as FD.tooltip: Hit the pot with a Sword Beam by summoning the scarecrow and targeting it for a good beam angle.

Smithy Fairy With Bombchu.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Smithy Fairy With Powder Keg.tooltip:
Break the pot with the Fairy inside by throwing a Powder Keg at it, either from your pack,
or from Medigoron during the Powder Keg Challenge.

Twin Islands Items in Winter.tooltip: Collect the items in the ice in Twin Islands using highly technical Zora Boomerang tricks.

Fish Push.tooltip:
Drop a fish on the slope leading up to the Goron Racetrack Grotto, and push it up the slope to
prevent yourself from sliding down.

Zoey Grotto Recoil Flip.tooltip:
Recoil flip up the slope leading to the Goron Racetrack grotto.
You must sidehop out of the snow immediately before the recoil flip

Twin Islands FD Diving.tooltip:
Dive for the underwater rupees in springtime Twin Islands as Fierce Deity Link.
Simply swim over the items, and hold A.

Goron Racetrack Access as Giant.tooltip: Climb around the giant boulder as Giant Link, and into the loading zone.

Mountain Tingle as FD.tooltip:
Jump slash Tingle's balloon in the mountains as Fierce Deity.
You don't have to stand on the nearby post to get enough height, but it helps.

Powder Keg Challenge Access as FD.text: Powder Keg Challenge Access as FD
Powder Keg Challenge Access as FD.tooltip: Fierce Deity Link is tall enough to thaw the ice in front of Medigoron's cave with hot spring water.

Goron Village Invisible Platforming Back.tooltip: Get back from Lone Peak Shrine (Lens Cave) using the invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Path to Snowhead without Magic.tooltip: Roll along the sides of the gaps.

Path to Snowhead Jumping and Climbing.text: Path to Snowhead Jumping and Climbing
Path to Snowhead Jumping and Climbing.tooltip: Long jump and climb across the gaps in Path to Snowhead.

Path to Snowhead as FD.tooltip: Jump across the gaps in Path to Snowhead with the Fierce Deity Anywhere gimmick.

Path to Snowhead Pillar Without Lens of.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar Without Lens of Truth
Path to Snowhead Pillar Without Lens of.tooltip: Jump along the invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Path to Snowhead Pillar as FD.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar as FD
Path to Snowhead Pillar as FD.tooltip: Jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar as Fierce Deity.

Path to Snowhead Pillar as Giant Link.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar as Giant Link
Path to Snowhead Pillar as Giant Link.tooltip: Jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar as Giant Link.

Path to Snowhead Pillar Long Jump Climb.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar Long Jump Climb
Path to Snowhead Pillar Long Jump Climb.tooltip:
Long jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar with the Climb Most
Surfaces gimmick.

SHT Tall Jumps.tooltip:
With Zora Mask, Adult Link, or Fierce Deity, get through the bridge room and the Goron Pound switch
room with some platforming.

SHT Lensless Walls/Ceilings.tooltip:
Pass through false walls, and also collect Stray Fairies in false walls and ceilings,
without Lens of Truth.

SHT Pillar Skip.tooltip: Shoot or bomb the snowballs, then jump down.

SHT Jump to Stray Fairies.tooltip: Jump to the two fairies in the SHT bridge room.

SHT Fireless.tooltip: Thaw ice with precise arrow shots through torches, and raise the pillar with Flame Storage.

SHT Lensless Map Room Ledge.tooltip:
Jump along the small invisible platforms leading to the Stray Fairy chest at the top of the Map
room without Lens of Truth.

SHT as Giant.tooltip:
Navigate Snowhead Temple with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.
You can go all the way to the top with just Giant's Mask and a Magic Meter!

SHT Gainers.tooltip: Use Gainers in Snowhead Temple to climb ledges that are barely out of reach.

SHT Goron Bomb Jumps.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump to ledges that are just barely out of reach in Snowhead Temple.

SHT Long Jumps.tooltip: Cross gaps in Snowhead Temple with Long Jumps.

SHT Twin Block Goron Pound.tooltip:
Get on top of the two blocks stacked on top of eachother with an extremely precise,
nuanced Goron Pound that clips into the corner of the block.

SHT Bridge Room With Bunny Hood.text: SHT Bridge Room With Bunny Hood
SHT Bridge Room With Bunny Hood.tooltip:
Get past the bridge room with an extremely precise jump and jump slash as human,
only possible with Bunny Hood.

SHT Elevator Skip as FD.tooltip: Skip using the elevator that requires Fire Arrows with a jump from the crates as Fierce Deity Link.

SHT Ramps as FD.tooltip: Jump across the ledges with ramps on the 2nd floor as Fierce Deity Link.

SHT Pixelshot.tooltip: From the first floor, Hookshot the torch in the main room above where the Scarecrow is.

SHT Frozen Switch Clip.tooltip: In the Compass room, roll into the switch at the right angle to activate it without thawing the ice.

SHT 3F Jumps.tooltip:
Jump from the top level of the frozen stairwell to the platform with the 3rd locked door,
and also jump from the 3rd locked door to the Goron Pound switch room.

SHT Fireless Pillar Long Jump.tooltip:
Long jump around the ramps on the 2nd floor in the main room, even if the pillar is raised,
with a tall form and precise Long Jump angles.

SHT Icicle Room Rupees as Zora.text: SHT Icicle Room Rupees as Zora
SHT Icicle Room Rupees as Zora.tooltip: Collect the rupees with Zora Boomerangs without breaking the ice.

SHT Fairy Bubbles With Explosives.tooltip: Collect Stray Fairies in Snowhead Temple by popping the bubbles with explosives or Bombchu.

Bowless Aliens.tooltip: Pause and unpause until 5:15. Logic expects Sun's Song.

Milk Multiple Cows.tooltip:
Play Epona's Song multiple times in a row for a group of cows before any respond.
Then they will all give you their item.

Dog Race Luck.tooltip: Removes Mask of Truth as a requirement for Dog Race.

Doggy Racetrack Chest With Jump Slash.text: Doggy Racetrack Chest With Jump Slash
Doggy Racetrack Chest With Jump Slash.tooltip: Use a jump slash to upwarp on top of the awning in the Doggy Racetrack for the chest.

Ranch Tingle With Sword Beams.tooltip:
Shoot a Sword Beam at Tingle's balloon as Fierce Deity Link.
You can get the right angle by targeting the pickaxe guy between him and the rock, on all 3 days.

Doggy Racetrack Chest With Nothing.tooltip: Climb onto the awning with a precise jump without using a sword to Jump Slash through it.

Coast Ledge Long Jump.tooltip:
Long Jump from the top of the Hookshot target to the next ledge, then long jump from there to the
Piece of Heart on the next ledge.

Coast Ledge Zora Jump.tooltip: Jump to the Piece of Heart on the ledge from the higher ledge as Zora or Adult Link.

Coast Ledge as FD.tooltip:
Jump to the highest ledge from the Hookshot target as Fierce Deity, then jump to the ledge for the
Piece of Heart.

Coast Ledge as Giant.tooltip:
Climb to the Hookshot target as Giant Link, then either Zora/Adult Gainer onto the Hookshot target
and Long Jump from there, or do the rest of the platforming as Fierce Deity.

Great Bay Cows With Nothing.tooltip: Get hurled up to the cow grotto in Great Bay Coast by a Like Like.

Great Bay Tingle as FD.tooltip:
Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity. You will need to cleverly utilize a Bombchu to
target for the right angle.

Exit OSH Without Goron.tooltip: Backwalk up the slope to exit.

OSH Brute Force Code.tooltip: Removes Captain's Hat as requirement for Ocean Spider House mask code.

OSH Fireless.tooltip:
At the entrance, simply hit the skulltula from a precise position.
In the storage room, get on the boat, slash the skulltula, then jump slash to get the token.

OSH Storage Room Clip.tooltip: In the Ocean Spider House storage room, jump onto the boat and clip through the ceiling.

Enter Ocean Spider House as Goron.text: Enter Ocean Spider House as Goron
Enter Ocean Spider House as Goron.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump over the fence in the first room.

Enter Ocean Spider House as Giant.text: Enter Ocean Spider House as Giant
Enter Ocean Spider House as Giant.tooltip:
Destroy the cracked wall with a swing of Giant Link's sword, and also get past the fence in the
first room with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

OSH as Zora.tooltip:
Collect the tokens from the Skulltulas inside holes in the Oceanside Spider House as Zora with
either boomerangs through walls, or very precise boomerangs into the holes.

OSH as Giant.tooltip: Collect Skulltula Tokens in holes by jumping out of bounds with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as A.text: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Hookshot
OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as A.tooltip: Collect the token through the wall with Hookshot.

OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as A.text: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Fish
OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as A.tooltip: Collect the token through the wall with... a fish??

OSH Entrance Skulls With Nothing.tooltip: Kill the skulls somehow, and collect their tokens with precise sidehops.

OSH Entrance Web Skull as Goron.text: OSH Entrance Web Skull as Goron
OSH Entrance Web Skull as Goron.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump onto the fence, then Goron Pound and platform up the webs to get to the Skulltula.

Swim to Zora Hall as Human.text: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Swim to Zora Hall as Human.tooltip: You can avoid being damaged by the fish by swimming sideways.

Zora Cape as Giant.tooltip: Climb all the way up to the Waterfall Rapids with tactical jump slashes as Giant Link.

Zora Jar Game with Explosives.tooltip:
Blow up all the pots on the same frame. Can be "buffered" with Ocarina,
or simply done with a well-timed Blast Mask explosion combined with a bomb.

Ocean Great Fairy With Ice Arrows.text: Ocean Great Fairy With Ice Arrows
Ocean Great Fairy With Ice Arrows.tooltip:
Create ice platforms with Ice Arrows, and climb up to the Ocean Great Fairy as a tall form,
or with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Ocean Great Fairy as FD.tooltip:
Perform a Zora High Ledge Grab to the small island nearest the grotto,
then jump the rest of the way with Fierce Deity Link.

Turtle Jump.tooltip: Jump and "climb" onto the turtle you ride to Great Bay Temple as Fierce Deity Link.

Zora Jar Game With Powder Keg.text: Zora Jar Game With Powder Keg
Zora Jar Game With Powder Keg.tooltip: Simply place a Powder Keg in the middle and watch it blow up all the jars at once, winning the game.

Zora Cape Recoil Flip.tooltip: Recoil flip from above the Deku Flower to the Ledge Without Tree Chest.

Like Like With Bombchu.tooltip: Kill the Like Like under the falls in Zora Cape with Bombchu.

The Giant Dive.tooltip:
Kill the Like-Like under the falls in Zora Cape from a distance, then dive for the item using
Giant's Mask to grab it as if it was Ruto's Letter.

Lulu's Ledge as Goron.tooltip: Goron Pound underneath the ledge with the Heart Piece in Lulu's Room to upwarp on top of it.

Lulu's Ledge as Zora.tooltip: Climb onto the ledge in Lulu's room by navigating the furniture.

PF Guard Room Rear Entry.tooltip: Jump from the Hookshot room to the back entrance of the Guard room. Or roll over the roof as Goron.

FD Jump Into PFI.tooltip: Jump from the pound switch to the railing outside Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Hookshot Room Skull Flag Rupees With Zor.text: Hookshot Room Skull Flag Rupees With Zora Boomerangs
Hookshot Room Skull Flag Rupees With Zor.tooltip:
Collect the rupees from the skull flag in the Hookshot room without releasing the bees using Zora
Boomerangs through the walls.

Hookshot Room Long Jump to Tank.text: Hookshot Room Long Jump to Tank
Hookshot Room Long Jump to Tank.tooltip: Long jump from the Hookshot chest to the tank with the egg inside.

Sewers With Bombchu.tooltip: Navigate through Pirates' Fortress Sewers using Bombchu to hit the crystal switches where available.

Sewers With Explosives.tooltip:
Long Jump to the first crystal switch to raise the metal gate.
With Blast Mask, you can also hit the second crystal switch to activate the water elevator while
simultaneously performing a Long Jump/Recoil Flip to get to the water elevator in time.

Pinnacle Rock without Seahorse.tooltip: Learn the path and enter Pinnacle Rock without the Seahorse.

GBT Goron Waterwheel.tooltip: Skip the first yellow turnkey with a precise Goron roll.

GBT Cutscene Diving.tooltip:
Freeze and unfreeze the water blocking the green pump room to dive to the deeper parts of the
temple without Zora Mask.

GBT as Giant.tooltip:
Pass the water control room as Giant Link. You can also take the mask off in the water in the
whirlpool room to dive to the bottom without Zora Mask.

GBT Whirlpool Access as FD.tooltip:
Skip using the yellow valve in the water control room to activate the yellow pipe's water stream
platform, by just jumping across as Fierce Deity Link.

GBT Red Pump Long Jump.tooltip: Long Jump from the pipe to the red water pump turn key (outside Wart room) with explosives.

GBT Red Pump as FD.tooltip: Jump to the red water pump turn key (outside Wart room) from below as Fierce Deity Link.

GBT Red Valve Early.tooltip:
Get to the closed red valve room early by bonking off a nearby wall while dolphin diving out of the
water as Zora, and use a Gainer to climb up to the ledge with the turnkey without freezing the Chu
Chu.

GBT Map Chest Room Jumps.tooltip:
Jump around the platforms in the room with the Map Chest in Great Bay Temple as Zora/Adult
Link/Fierce Deity, or with Long Jumps. In particular, FD can jump to the seesaw room from here.

GBT Red Control Turnkey as FD.text: GBT Red Control Turnkey as FD
GBT Red Control Turnkey as FD.tooltip:
Jump to the platform with the red turnkey in the water control room as Fierce Deity Link from the
rising platform on the left.

GBT Red Control Turnkey With Bombs.text: GBT Red Control Turnkey With Bombs
GBT Red Control Turnkey With Bombs.tooltip:
Skip needing Hookshot to use the red turnkey in the water control room by recoil flipping to the
platform. Alternatively, use a Goron Bomb Jump or a Deku shield recoil.

GBT Exit as FD.tooltip:
Jump to the turtle's nose as Fierce Deity with a precise jump from the torches,
then strafe around the nose and up onto the turtle's back.

GBT Exit as Goron.tooltip:
Goron Bomb Jump onto the turtle's nose from the torches Stray Fairy chest,
then Goron Bomb Jump onto the turtle's back.

GBT Exit With Nothing.tooltip:
Exit Great Bay Temple with only sticks, if necessary. Jump slash onto the turtle's nose,
then you can jump slash around the turtle's eye and onto its back.
This trick is very, very unlikely to be required; mostly used to remove exit requirements from
Great Bay Temple in Dungeon Entrance Randomizer.

GBT Green Pump Room Early as FD.text: GBT Green Pump Room Early as FD
GBT Green Pump Room Early as FD.tooltip: Jump around the waterstream blocking the ladder to the green pump room as Fierce Deity Link.

GBT Iceless.tooltip: Navigate through the waterwheel room without Ice Arrows.

GBT Fireless.tooltip: Navigate through the seesaw room without Fire Arrows.

GBT Boss Door as FD.tooltip:
Skip setting up the green pipe water stream platform with a simple jump across the gap to the Great
Bay boss door as Fierce Deity Link.

GBT Iron Goron Sneaks Past Dexihands.text: GBT Iron Goron Sneaks Past Dexihands
GBT Iron Goron Sneaks Past Dexihands.tooltip:
Get past the Dexihands between the map chest room and the Bio Baba tunnel by quickly swimming
through as human. Also, open the Great Bay Small Key chest by juking out the dexihand there.

GBT Boss Key With Ice Arrows.text: GBT Boss Key With Ice Arrows
GBT Boss Key With Ice Arrows.tooltip: Create an Ice Arrow platform and climb up the window to skip the Gekko fight.

GBT Boss Key With Explosives.tooltip:
Long jump to the Great Bay Boss Key chest with explosives. A tall figure is needed to grab onto the
window.

GBT Boss Key as FD.tooltip: Jump to the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest as Fierce Deity Link.

GBT Boss Key as Zora/Adult.tooltip:
Jump to the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest with a highly precise diagonal roll jump
against the wall as Zora or Adult Link.

GBT Boss Key as Giant.tooltip:
As Giant Link, jump slash to the right of the ice blocking the door from near the Small Key chest
to get to the Boss Key chest with a bizarre clip.

GBT Underwater Hookshot.tooltip: Hookshot into most of the rooms of Great Bay Temple with the gimmick Hookshot Any Surface.

GBT Boss Key Climb.tooltip:
Climb into the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces;
requires climbing above the window and jump slashing inside.

GBT Skulltula With Stick.tooltip: Kill the Skulltula holding a Stray Fairy in Great Bay Temple with a Deku Stick.

GBT Stray Fairy Collection With Bombchu.text: GBT Stray Fairy Collection With Bombchu
GBT Stray Fairy Collection With Bombchu.tooltip: Release Stray Fairies in Great Bay Temple from jars, barrels, and bubbles using Bombchu.

GBT Water Control Room Underwater Fairy.text: GBT Water Control Room Underwater Fairy With Nothing
GBT Water Control Room Underwater Fairy.tooltip: Get this fairy with two precise dives from the platform with the Skulltula and the rupee triangle.

GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy as Zora.text: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy as Zora
GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy as Zora.tooltip:
Jump out of the water at the Stray Fairy underneath the green turnkey in the room before Gyorg as
Zora.

GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy Recoil Flip.text: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy Recoil Flip
GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy Recoil Flip.tooltip: Recoil flip into the stray fairy bubble underneath the green turnkey in the room before Gyorg.

GBT Waterwheel Room as FD.tooltip: Jump to the Stray Fairy chests in the Waterwheel Room as Fierce Deity Link.

GBT Waterwheel Fairy Chests With Explosi.text: GBT Waterwheel Fairy Chests With Explosives
GBT Waterwheel Fairy Chests With Explosi.tooltip:
Long jump to the upper Stray Fairy chest from the rising platform, and recoil flip to the lower
Stray Fairy chest from the horizontally moving platform.

GBT Waterwheel Room Lower Chest With Not.text: GBT Waterwheel Room Lower Chest With Nothing
GBT Waterwheel Room Lower Chest With Not.tooltip:
Get into the lower cove with the Stray Fairy chest in the waterwheel room with a very precise
sidehop and a jump slash.

GBT Green Pump Room Climb.tooltip:
Shimmy up the green pipe to get above the ceiling in the green pump room with the gimmick Climb
Most Surfaces.

GBT Whirlpool Jar as FD.tooltip:
Break the jar with the Stray Fairy at the bottom of the giant whirlpool with a precise Sword Beam
angled by targeting a Bombchu.

GBT Bio Babas With Bombchu.tooltip: Kill all 4 Bio Babas for the Stray Fairy chest with Bombchu.

GBT Dexihands Jar With Explosives.tooltip: Blow up the jar holding this Stray Fairy captive, then collect the Fairy with a surviving Dexihand.

GBT Green Pump Room Giant Upwarp.text: GBT Green Pump Room Giant Upwarp
GBT Green Pump Room Giant Upwarp.tooltip:
After entering the green pump room, put on Giant's Mask from a precise position to instantly warp
to the ceiling section of the room.

GBT Gyorg Quick Kill.tooltip:
Skip the cutscene for Gyorg spawning piranhas by finishing it off with Fierce Deity while it is
above the platform.

GBT Gyorg Without Magic.tooltip: Kill Gyorg using only Zora Link, and no magic.

GBT Gyorg With Arrows.tooltip: Kill Gyorg with only arrows by sidehopping into the water and shooting arrows at it as you fall in.

GBT Gyorg as Goron.tooltip: Kill Gyorg with the Iron Goron gimmick.

Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bomb Jum.text: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bomb Jumps
Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bomb Jum.tooltip: Self-explanatory. Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair.

Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bubble B.text: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bubble Boosts
Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bubble B.tooltip: Damage boost off the bubbles at night in Road to Ikana with Goron Pounds.

Ikana Canyon Access as FD.tooltip: Damage boost onto the boulder below the ghost, then climb up with a gainer as Fierce Deity.

Road to Ikana Pot as FD.text: Road to Ikana Pot as FD
Road to Ikana Pot as FD.tooltip: Hit the pot with a Sword Beam by summoning the scarecrow and targeting it for a good beam angle.

Road to Ikana Pot With Bombchu.text: Road to Ikana Pot With Bombchu
Road to Ikana Pot With Bombchu.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth.text: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth
Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth.tooltip:
Pass the false wall into Day 2 Grave, and cross the section with the invisible floor without Lens
of Truth.

Stun Keeta with Bombs.tooltip: Use a bomb to stun Captain Keeta before he moves away.

Defeat Dampe Big Poe With Nothing.text: Defeat Dampe Big Poe With Nothing
Defeat Dampe Big Poe With Nothing.tooltip:
You can lure the Big Poe to the stairs for a clean shot at jump slashing it with your best sword,
or Deku Sticks.

Defeat Keeta With Sticks.tooltip:
Beat Keeta with only a single broken Deku Stick. You can either fight through the Stalchildren,
which is tight on time, or simply mash backflip up the slope near the Captain's Hat chest and
intercept Keeta.

Keeta as Goron.tooltip: Defeat Keeta without stunning him as Goron Link by getting through the Stalchildren quickly.

Ikana Graveyard Rocks Without Sonata.tooltip:
Get on the other side of Keeta without waking him up by performing a very precise Goron Pound onto
a lantern above the door to Dampe's hut, backflip a little higher, then do a twisted backflip as
human to climb up.

Ikana Graveyard Bats With Sticks and Bom.text: Ikana Graveyard Bats With Sticks and Bombs
Ikana Graveyard Bats With Sticks and Bom.tooltip:
Kill the bats in Day 1 grave with only sticks, and kill all the bats around the graveyard on day 2
with sticks and bombs.

Ikana Canyon Iceless.tooltip: Hookshot to the first stump from a precise position.

Poe Hut With Bombs and Sticks.text: Poe Hut With Bombs and Sticks
Poe Hut With Bombs and Sticks.tooltip:
Defeat the first three Poes with Deku Sticks, then simply blow up the last Poe with bombs or Blast
Mask.

Canyon Ledge as FD.tooltip: Jump to the Piece of Heart as Fierce Deity, with moderate precision required.

Canyon Tingle as FD.tooltip:
Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity. You will need to cleverly utilize a Bombchu or a
Guay to target for the right angle.

Defeat Well Big Poe With Bombs.text: Defeat Well Big Poe With Bombs
Defeat Well Big Poe With Bombs.tooltip: Kill the Big Poe in the Well by simply throwing bombs at it.

Pacifist Well Hot Spring Water.tooltip:
Collect Hot Spring Water in the Well without killing the Dexihand by quickly scooping the water
from behind it, and soaring away.

Wallmaster Void Out.tooltip:
Bring Hot Spring Water from the Dexihand to the Well Cow by allowing a Wallmaster to grab you and
take you back to the Ikana Castle side of the well.

Ikana Castle Invisible Platform Without.text: Ikana Castle Invisible Platform Without Lens of Truth
Ikana Castle Invisible Platform Without.tooltip: Navigate the single invisible ice platform in Ikana Castle without Lens of Truth.

Igos Fight Swordless.tooltip: Defeat Igos du Ikana with Deku Sticks or something like Ice Arrows.

Ikana Castle Gainer.tooltip: Perform a Gainer over the sun block blocking Ikana Castle.

Ikana Castle Access as Goron.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump over the sun block blocking Ikana Castle.

Ikana Castle as FD.tooltip:
Get through the left side of Ikana Castle as Fierce Deity Link, and also jump to the Castle Pillar
Heart Piece without Deku Mask.

Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Zor.text: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Zora/Adult Link
Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Zor.tooltip:
Get on top of the falling ceiling as Zora or Adult Link with either a Gainer or a sidehop jump
slash, then climb to the switch that unlocks the barred doors.

Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Hum.text: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Human
Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Hum.tooltip:
Get on top of the falling ceiling with either a Gainer or a sidehop jump slash,
raise the ceiling by shooting one of the crystal switches with bow, then ride the ceiling up to the
switch that unlocks the barred doors.

Ikana Castle Pillar as Goron.tooltip:
Goron Bomb Jump onto the railing of the side of the castle, then navigate along the railing and
sidehop to the Piece of Heart.

Ikana Castle Hole Room Jumps.tooltip:
Jump to the pots in the hole room of Ikana Castle as human, and jump around the Skulltulas while
doing the room in reverse.

Climb Stone Tower with One Transformatio.text: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Climb Stone Tower with One Transformatio.tooltip: Play Elegy while on a block to ride the block up.

Climb Stone Tower as FD.tooltip: Skip half of the Elegy of Emptiness switches with Fierce Deity Link's jumps.

Climb Stone Tower as Giant.tooltip:
Climb the entirety of Stone Tower with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.
Requires a sword for jump slashing.

Flip Stone Tower Without Elegy.tooltip:
Shoot a Light Arrow with a precise shot, combined with a precise roll to manipulate one of the
Elegy of Emptiness blocks out of the way of the shot.

Stone Tower Bean Chests as Giant.text: Stone Tower Bean Chests as Giant
Stone Tower Bean Chests as Giant.tooltip: Jump slash to the bean chests as Giant Link.

STT Elegy Maze With Bombchu.tooltip: Break the cracked wall with a Real Bombchu detonation.

STT Water Tunnel as Human.tooltip:
Swim through the underwater tunnel with a precise roll jump dive inside.
Hold A for the deepest possible dive.

STT Elegy Maze Climb.tooltip: Climb over the exit game in the maze with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces enabled.

STT as Giant.tooltip: Navigate through uninverted Stone Tower Temple with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere enabled.

STT Eyegore Bridge as Zora.tooltip: Dolphin dive onto the Eyegore bridge as Zora Link with a precise bonk.

STT Eyegore Bridge With Explosives.tooltip:
Get on top of the railing or sunblock in the Eyegore room, then Recoil Flip or Long Jump onto the
bridge. Alternatively, Goron Bomb Jump onto the bridge from an Ice Arrow ice platform.

STT Gainers.tooltip: Gainer onto the sun block in Stone Tower Temple with sufficiently tall transformations.

STT Eyegore Bridge as FD.tooltip: Jump onto the Eyegore Bridge as Fierce Deity Link.

STT Updraft Room With Explosives.tooltip: Recoil flip through the updraft room with explosives.

STT Updraft Room as FD.tooltip: Jump through the updraft room as Fierce Deity Link.

STT Updraft Room With Powder Keg.text: STT Updraft Room With Powder Keg
STT Updraft Room With Powder Keg.tooltip:
Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then use a Powder Keg to Recoil Flip
through the other 2 sets of updrafts.

STT Updraft Room as Goron/Zora.tooltip:
Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then use a Zora Jump Slash recoil to
fly through the other 2 sets of updrafts.

STT Lava Room Ledge as Zora.text: STT Lava Room Ledge as Zora
STT Lava Room Ledge as Zora.tooltip:
Perform an incredibly precise Zora Jump Slash in the first updraft to barely make it onto this
ledge.

STT Lava Room Ledge as Goron.text: STT Lava Room Ledge as Goron
STT Lava Room Ledge as Goron.tooltip: Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then hookshot the chest.

STT Eyegore Bridge to Courtyard.tooltip:
Jump slash onto the railing of the bridge, and then cross the water with either Deku Mask,
Ice Arrows, or a Recoil Flip.

STT Garo Master With Sticks.tooltip: Defeat the Garo Master in Stone Tower Temple with Deku Sticks.

STT Map Chest Recoil Flip.tooltip: From the basement ledge, use a precise curved Recoil Flip to land on top of the sun block.

STT Basement Ledge Jump Slash Recoil.text: STT Basement Ledge Jump Slash Recoil
STT Basement Ledge Jump Slash Recoil.tooltip:
Get onto the basement ledge by falling down the hole in the ceiling, and using a Jump Slash wall
recoil to land on the ledge.

STT Basement Ceiling With Real Bombchu.text: STT Basement Ceiling With Real Bombchu
STT Basement Ceiling With Real Bombchu.tooltip: Blow up the hole in the ceiling of the basement room with a Real Bombchu from the maze.

STT Map Chest as Zora.tooltip:
Jump Slash the wall in the ceiling hole as Zora Link to recoil off and land on the sun block in the
basement.

STT Map Chest as FD.tooltip: From the basement ledge, jump on top of the sun block.

STT Armos With Nuts.tooltip:
Lure the Armos behind the sun block in the basement room closer with Deku Nuts,
then kill them through the wall.

STT Armos With Bombchu.tooltip: Kill the Armos behind the sun block in the basement room with Bombchu.

STT Thin Bridge Crystal as Zora.text: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as Zora
STT Thin Bridge Crystal as Zora.tooltip: Hit the switch through the floor with Zora Boomerangs.

STT Thin Bridge Crystal as FD.text: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as FD
STT Thin Bridge Crystal as FD.tooltip:
Jump slash the crystal through the wall as Fierce Deity Link.
Alternatively, target the Hiploop and shoot a sword beam at the crystal from below.

STT Thin Bridge Crystal With Nothing.text: STT Thin Bridge Crystal With Nothing
STT Thin Bridge Crystal With Nothing.tooltip: Jump slash the crystal through the wall with as little as a Deku Stick.

STT Underwater Sun Switch Snipe.tooltip:
Shoot the underwater sun switch from the uninverted side of the temple with precise timing using a
sidehop over the water.

STT Underwater Sun Switch With Ice Arrow.text: STT Underwater Sun Switch With Ice Arrows
STT Underwater Sun Switch With Ice Arrow.tooltip: Shoot the underwater sun switch from the uninverted side on top of an ice platform over the water.

STT Goron Bomb Jumps.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump on top of the sun blocks in the Eyegore room.

STT Bridge Crystal With Explosives.tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with explosives through the railing.

STT Bridge Crystal as Zora.tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with Zora Boomerangs through the railing.

STT Bridge Crystal With Nothing.tooltip:
Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with as little as a single Deku Stick through the
railing, with a precise Jump Slash.

STT Bridge Crystal With Spin Attack.text: STT Bridge Crystal With Spin Attack
STT Bridge Crystal With Spin Attack.tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with a big Spin Attack.

STT Bridge Crystal With Ice Arrows.text: STT Bridge Crystal With Ice Arrows
STT Bridge Crystal With Ice Arrows.tooltip:
Make yourself ice platforms with Ice Arrows to get to the area with the crystal switch in the
Eyegore room.

Shoot Twinmold.tooltip: Shoot Twinmold's tail with arrows instead of fighting with Giant's Mask.

ISTT Hookshot to Eyegore.tooltip: Shoot the Eyegore with Light Arrows from below, then hookshot to the chest.

ISTT Early Boss Key.tooltip: Drop down from the Dexihand either as Deku or with a sidehop and Jump Slash.

ISTT Lightless Boss Key.tooltip: Kill Gomess without Light Arrows by waiting for an opening when Gomess uses a special attack.

ISTT Updraft Recoil Flips.tooltip:
Recoil flip inside the tallest updraft to get to the Updraft Fire Ring chest,
and to the upstairs puzzle rooms.

ISTT Lobby Long Jump.tooltip: Long Jump to the Death Armos switch with explosives.

ISTT Lobby as FD.tooltip: Jump to the Death Armos switch as Fierce Deity Link.

ISTT as Giant.tooltip:
Navigate through the rooms of Inverted Stone Tower Temple as Giant Link with the gimmick Giant's
Mask Anywhere.

ISTT Updrafts Without Deku Mask.tooltip: Ride the updrafts up without Deku Mask.

ISTT Lava Room Gainer.tooltip: Gainer through the upsidedown lava room upstairs with a sufficiently tall transformation.

ISTT Lava Room With Explosives.tooltip: Recoil flip through the upsidedown lava room upstairs, or Goron Bomb Jump over the short wall.

ISTT Eyegore Bridge Recoil Flips.tooltip:
Recoil Flip from the bridge to either side, including towards the Dexihand,
to get launched into the updraft room.

ISTT Wizzrobe Goron Bomb Jump.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump to the Wizzrobe chest from below.

ISTT Hanging Explosive Dodging.tooltip:
Cross under the Eyegore bridge with the Deku Flowers by flying underneath the explosives,
and flying into them from behind to destroy them.

ISTT Poe Gap as FD.tooltip: Jump the gap with the Poes as Fierce Deity Link.

ISTT Eyegore Bridge to Dexihand as FD.text: ISTT Eyegore Bridge to Dexihand as FD
ISTT Eyegore Bridge to Dexihand as FD.tooltip:
Self-explanatory jump. You may have to try several times before actually getting a proper jump off
the bridge.

ISTT Recoil Flip to Eyegore Bridge.text: ISTT Recoil Flip to Eyegore Bridge
ISTT Recoil Flip to Eyegore Bridge.tooltip: Recoil flip onto the Eyegore bridge from the passage leading out from the updraft room.

ISTT Death Armos Maze Chest Recoil Flip.text: ISTT Death Armos Maze Chest Recoil Flip
ISTT Death Armos Maze Chest Recoil Flip.tooltip:
Skip needing Elegy or Hookshot for the fire ring in the maze by simply outrunning the returning
fire with a recoil flip.

ISTT Thin Bridge Rupees as Goron.text: ISTT Thin Bridge Rupees as Goron
ISTT Thin Bridge Rupees as Goron.tooltip: Collect the rupees from above by rolling over them as Goron Link.

ISTT Frozen Eye Chest Ledge With Nothing.text: ISTT Frozen Eye Chest Ledge With Nothing
ISTT Frozen Eye Chest Ledge With Nothing.tooltip: Jump to the ledge where the Stray Fairy chest spawns from above with no items.

ISTT Thin Bridge Three Blue Rupees as Zo.text: ISTT Thin Bridge Three Blue Rupees as Zora
ISTT Thin Bridge Three Blue Rupees as Zo.tooltip: Collect the rupees through the wall with Zora Boomerangs.

ISTT Updraft Rupee Gainer.tooltip:
Get up to the ledge with the two red rupees in the updraft room with a Gainer and a tall
transformation.

ISTT Updraft Rupee Goron Bomb Jump.text: ISTT Updraft Rupee Goron Bomb Jump
ISTT Updraft Rupee Goron Bomb Jump.tooltip: Get up to the ledge with the two red rupees in the updraft room with a Goron Bomb Jump.

ISTT Updraft Rupees as Zora.tooltip: Grab the rupees through the sun block with Zora Boomerangs.

Deku Trial as FD.tooltip:
Collect the Piece of Heart in Deku Trial without Deku Mask using some fine platforming as Fierce
Deity Link. You cannot actually complete the trial in this way.

Deku Trial With Hookshot Most Surfaces.text: Deku Trial With Hookshot Most Surfaces
Deku Trial With Hookshot Most Surfaces.tooltip: Hookshot your way across the trial. To get to the door, hookshot from the moving platform.

Goron Trial as FD.tooltip: Get through Goron Trial as Fierce Deity with sideways long jumps across long gaps.

Zora Trial as Human.tooltip:
Swim through the pipes as human. You need either Song of Time, Goron Mask,
or a death warp to escape the Heart Piece spot.

Link Trial With Sticks.tooltip: Kill the Dinolfos and defeat the Garo Master on the Moon with Deku Sticks.

Link Trial With Songs.tooltip:
Skip the challenges to unlock barred doors (and summon a ladder) on the Moon by playing songs at
specific Gossip Stones.

Link Trial as FD.tooltip:
Climb up past the Iron Knuckle as Fierce Deity Link without spawning the ladder.
Either jump from the Iron Knuckle chest, or perform a FD Gainer.

Termina Stump with No Items.tooltip: Slowly walk up the seam of the stump.

Ranch Tingle as FD.tooltip:
Climb the "Out of Bounds" ledge near the sign to Romani Ranch, and take Tingle down with a jump and
a Jump Slash.

Powder Keg Challenge Access as Zora/Adul.text: Powder Keg Challenge Access as Zora/Adult Link
Powder Keg Challenge Access as Zora/Adul.tooltip: Shield the ice, then quickly climb up and drop hot spring water before the ice hits you again.

Climb Into Romani Ranch.tooltip: Climb through the boulder in Milk Road with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

FD Jump into Ranch.tooltip:
Jump over the boulder in Milk Road as Fierce Deity. You can climb on some of the terrain near
Tingle.

Hookshot into Ranch.tooltip: Hookshot into Ranch with the gimmick Hookshot Any Surface.

Reverse Well With Climbing.tooltip: Enter the Well from Ikana Castle with Deku Mask and the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Garo Mask Skip.tooltip: Bug limit Ikana access with a Goron damage boost, a lot of slope climbing, and a recoil flip.

Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as Goron.text: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as Goron
Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as Goron.tooltip: Roll along the slope on the side as Goron to get to the upper chest in Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as FD.text: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as FD
Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as FD.tooltip:
Jump along the slope to the side as Fierce Deity to get to the upper chest in Pirates' Fortress
Interior.

Goron Racetrack Access as FD.tooltip:
Long jump onto some grabbable terrain as Fierce Deity, then navigate the terrain to sidehop into
the racetrack loading zone from above.

Goron Racetrack Access With Hookshot/Cli.text: Goron Racetrack Access With Hookshot/Climb Anywhere
Goron Racetrack Access With Hookshot/Cli.tooltip: Get above the giant boulder in front of the Goron Racetrack, and sidehop into the loading zone.

Swamp Tingle With Climbing.tooltip:
Climb up the wall near Tingle with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick to get in range for a jump slash
take down.

Super Bowless Aliens.tooltip:
Mash pause for ~30 minutes (That's real time, not in-game time!) to complete Aliens Defense without
a bow or Sun's Song.

Low% Ocean Great Fairy.tooltip:
Get to the Fairy Fountain in Zora Cape with just Zora Mask and an explosive.
Extremely precise and requires a highly specific setup; not for the faint of heart!

Path to Snowhead with Nothing.tooltip: Mash jump slashes on the slopes on the left sides of the gaps.

Road to Ikana Fences as Zora.text: Road to Ikana Fences as Zora
Road to Ikana Fences as Zora.tooltip:
Get over the fences in Road to Ikana with highly precise Zora ground jump, jump slash,
damage boosts with bombs.

Ikana Canyon Access as FD With Real Bomb.text: Ikana Canyon Access as FD With Real Bombchu
Ikana Canyon Access as FD With Real Bomb.tooltip:
Damage boost off a Real Bombchu during the day in Road to Ikana to get on the boulder under the
ghost for the trick Ikana Canyon Access as FD.

WFT Twisted Recoil Flip.tooltip:
Get through the first room in Woodfall Temple with a highly technical sideways recoil flip as Zora
or Adult Link; probably one of the most challenging jumps in all of Casual Logic!

Stump Chest With Bats.tooltip: Damage boost off a nearby Bad Bat as Goron to get on top of the stump.

Twinmold Minimalism.tooltip: Kill Twinmold with just about any valid damaging hitbox, including just a Kokiri Sword.

Rock Sirloin Fireless.tooltip:
Get the Rock Sirloin without lighting the chandelier or the torches.
Break the chandelier pot closest to the Baby Goron side with Goron Spikes to get the chandelier
swaying slightly, then quickly break the chandelier pot with the Rock Sirloin inside with an
extremely precise Goron Spike Roll.

Lens Cave With Powder Keg Challenge.text: Lens Cave With Powder Keg Challenge
Lens Cave With Powder Keg Challenge.tooltip:
Bring the Powder Keg from Medigoron across the invisible platforms and into Lone Peak Shrine to
blow up the rock. Requires multiple outrageously precise Keg tosses on platforms that you probably
can't see; good luck!

Faster Bank.tooltip: Makes Bank 2 require nothing, and Bank 3 require any wallet.

Scarecrow's Song.tooltip: Using Scarecrow's Song where not normally required.

Lensless Chests.tooltip: Open invisible chests without the Lens of Truth.

Long Jump.tooltip: Drop a bomb behind you then use the recoil to jump a long distance.

Run Through Poisoned Water.tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by walking as Zora, or FD if it is enabled.

Swim to Zora Hall as Human.text: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Swim to Zora Hall as Human.tooltip: You can avoid being damaged by the fish by swimming sideways.

Brute Force OSH Code.tooltip: Removes Captain's Hat as requirement for Ocean Spider House mask code.

Climb Stone Tower with One Transformatio.text: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Climb Stone Tower with One Transformatio.tooltip: Play Elegy while on a block to ride the block up.

Deku Playground Rupee Displacement.tooltip:
Make the Rupees in Deku Playground fall by repeatedly using transformation masks, trade items,
or the Ocarina of Time.

Bomb Hovering.tooltip: The quintessential technique of any glitched randomizer of Majora's Mask.

Enemy Interactions.tooltip: Utilize enemies to your advantage. Not compatible with randomized enemies!

Index Warp.tooltip: Activate the Hidden Owl, and you can soar to other owl statues without hitting them.

Goron Roll Item Grabs.tooltip: Abuse the Goron Rolling hitbox to pick up freestanding rupees.

Melt Sun Blocks With Water.tooltip:
Simply pour water on the sun block in front of the Stone Tower Compass Chest and it will "melt"
away.

Powder Keg Storage.tooltip: Throw the Powder Keg from Keg Trial to the Hungry Goron, and then you may soar away with it.

Deku Recoil.tooltip: Slide off a ledge at high speed by shielding an explosion as Deku.

Hookshot Clip.tooltip: Clip out of bounds by using the Hookshot on a torch near a wall.

Icicle Clip.tooltip: Clip through walls by backwalking into an icicle.

Ocarina Dive.tooltip: Pull out Ocarina while swinging your sword over a ledge.

Item Dive.tooltip: While hovering over water, use the Ocarina or a cutscene item.

SHT BK Skip.tooltip: Clip through the door using the icicle.

Poisoned Water as Goron.tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by rolling as Goron. You aren't guaranteed to have enough health to make it.

Lensless Jumping.tooltip: Jump along invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Lensless Walking.tooltip: Lens of Truth will not be required to walk on invisible walkways.

Bomber Guard Skip.tooltip: Backflip over the Bomber Hideout Guard.

Deku Guard Skip.tooltip: Backflip over the deku guards from the fence.

WFT 2nd Floor Skip.tooltip: Hookshot to the torch in the main room.

Kill Deku Shrine Big Octo.tooltip:
Kill the Big Octo blocking the Deku Shrine before clearing Woodfall Temple with the Bow, Hookshot,
or Zora Mask.

Deku Palace Bean Skip.tooltip: Backflip onto the gate, then jump to the fence.

Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Skip.tooltip:
Get on top of the falling ceiling with a sidehop and a jump slash, then ride the ceiling up to the
switch with a well timed arrow.

Goron Bomb Jump.tooltip: Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair.

GBT Fireless.tooltip: Navigate through the seesaw room without Fire Arrows.

Ikana Canyon Iceless.tooltip: Hookshot to the first stump from a precise position.

SHT Zora Jumps.tooltip: Jump from the bridge to the right side of the ice block. And jump to the 3rd locked door.

Pinnacle Rock without Seahorse.tooltip: Learn the path and enter Pinnacle Rock without the Seahorse.

Jump Slash through One Sided Geometry.text: Jump Slash through One Sided Geometry
Jump Slash through One Sided Geometry.tooltip: Get the South Clock Town chest and the Doggy Racetrack Roof chest by jump slashing.

Avoid Swamp Tree Bat.tooltip: Kill the other bats, then climb around the final bat with precision.

Goron Pound onto Ledges.tooltip:
Use Goron Pound to get on the Swamp Tourist House roof, the ledge in Lulu's room,
and the straw roof in SCT.

Zora Hall Scrub Ledge Climb.tooltip: Climb onto the ledge in Lulu's room by navigating the furniture.

Bowless Aliens.tooltip: Pause and unpause until 5:15. Logic expects Sun's Song.

Lensless Walls/Ceilings.tooltip: Walk and shoot through false walls without Lens of Truth.

Termina Stump with No Items.tooltip: Slowly walk up the seam of the stump.

ISTT Hookshot to Eyegore.tooltip: Shoot the Eyegore with Light Arrows from below, then hookshot to the chest.

Ocean Skulltulas without Fire Arrows.tooltip:
At the entrance, simply hit the skulltula from a precise position.
In the storage room, get on the boat, slash the skulltula, then jump slash to get the token.

SHT Jump to Stray Fairies.tooltip: Jump to the two fairies in the SHT bridge room.

Clever Ice Platforms.tooltip:
Use ice platforms to your advantage in less obvious places, including shooting the underwater sun
switch in STT or for the GBT Boss Key.

Inn Balcony Jump.tooltip: Jump to the Inn balcony as Zora or Adult Link.

STT Water Tunnel as Human.tooltip:
Swim through the underwater tunnel with a precise roll jump dive inside.
Hold A for the deepest possible dive.

Clever Bombchu Usage.tooltip: Use 10 packs of Bombchu for destroying beehives, Stray Fairy bubbles, and crystal switches in STT.

FD Jumps.tooltip: Leap across gaps only possible with the Allow Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere gimmick enabled.

STT Eyegore Bridge Jumps.tooltip:
Get on top of the railing from inside the bridge with a side hop and a jump slash.
Also, dolphin dive onto the bridge as Zora by swimming into either bridge supports with a precise
angle.

Out of Bounds.tooltip: Go out of bounds to get to difficult areas and loading zones.

Inn Balcony with Cucco.tooltip: Use a Cucco from the Bombers' Hide and Seek to jump to the Stock Pot Inn balcony.

Zora Boomerang Through Walls.tooltip: Use Zora Boomerangs through walls by hugging the wall at an angle.

Ocarina Items.tooltip:
Play other items like you would play the Ocarina. Also includes duplicating bottles over masks and
other inventory items.

Action Swap.tooltip: While holding an item and crouching, pull out another item and quickly interact with an actor.

Long Bomb Hovers.tooltip: Perform bomb hovers with many explosions.

Time Stop.tooltip: Delay triggered events by using a bottle in Link's hand immediately after shielding while targeting.

Blast Mask Hovers.tooltip: Get ISG in certain locations to perform Blast Mask-Only hovers.

Recoil Flip Through Ice.tooltip:
Recoil flip through ice in Termina Field, Twin Islands, and Snowhead Temple using only a shield or
Zora Mask.

Deliver Deku Princess Without Deku Mask.text: Deliver Deku Princess Without Deku Mask
Deliver Deku Princess Without Deku Mask.tooltip: Hover over the Deku King's chamber, and drop the Deku Princess from above.

Day 1 Grave Clip.tooltip: Sidehop into Composer Flat's grave at an angle.

Restricted Items.tooltip: Use normally unavailable items indoors by equipping and using an item on the frame of a ledge popup.

STT BK Skip.tooltip: Recoil flip through the door. Alternatively, hover to the loading zone to Twinmold.

Jump Slash Take Downs.tooltip: Hit things with mid-air jump slashes.

Postman without Bunny Hood.tooltip: Get exactly 10 seconds without using the Bunny Hood.

Keeta with Minimal Items.tooltip: Defeat Keeta without stunning him at all. A broken deku and some speed will be sufficient.

STT Updrafts without Deku Mask.tooltip: Ride the ISTT updrafts up one level, and cross the STT updrafts without Deku Mask.

Path to Snowhead without Magic.tooltip: Roll along the sides of the gaps.

Shoot Twinmold.tooltip: Shoot Twinmold's tail with arrows instead of fighting with Giant's Mask.

SHT Pillar Skip.tooltip: Shoot or bomb the snowballs, then jump down.

GBT Iceless Boss Key.tooltip: Jump to the Boss Key chest without an ice platform.

ISTT Early Boss Key.tooltip: Drop down from the Dexihand either as Deku or with a sidehop and jump slash.

Lensless Climbing.tooltip: Climb the Mountain Village invisible ladder without Lens of Truth.

Gainer.tooltip: Backflip away from a wall, then re-target the wall 1 frame later.

GBT Iceless.tooltip:
Reverse the water flow without Ice Arrows by using a Long Jump and a Gainer.
Pass through the waterwheel room with a precise jump out of the water.

Zora Jar Game with Explosives.tooltip:
Blow up all the pots on the same frame. Can be "buffered" with Ocarina,
or simply done with a well-timed Blast Mask explosion combined with a bomb.

Keaton Grass Small Spin.tooltip: Hit all 9 keaton bushes with a small sword and small spin attack.

GBT Goron Waterwheel.tooltip: Skip the first yellow turnkey with a precise Goron roll.

Powder Kegs as Explosives.tooltip: Use Powder Kegs in place of other explosives.

Recoil Flip.tooltip: Cross gaps by shielding an explosion during a backflip.

ISTT Lightless Boss Key.tooltip: Kill Gomess without Light Arrows by waiting for an opening when Gomess uses a special attack.

FD Difficult Jumps.tooltip:
Perform the most difficult jumps, only possible with the Allow Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere gimmick
enabled.

Snowball Skip.tooltip: Backflip past the large snowballs blocking the way in Path to Mountain Village.

SHT Fireless.tooltip:
Thaw ice with precise arrow shots through torches, raise the pillar with Flame Storage,
and activate the switch in the Compass room by rolling into the ice.

Big Octo Skip.tooltip:
Get past the left side Big Octo with a precise jump and Deku voiding invulnerability frames,
or get past the right side Big Octo with a Goron roll from above.

Powder Keg Challenge with Hot Spring Wat.text: Powder Keg Challenge with Hot Spring Water
Powder Keg Challenge with Hot Spring Wat.tooltip:
Link can use Hot Spring Water to melt the ice in front of Medigoron's cave with ISG.
Zora and Fierce Deity can also do it without ISG.

GBT Cutscene Diving.tooltip:
Freeze and unfreeze the water blocking the green pump room to dive to the deeper parts of the
temple without Zora Mask.

Harder Long Jumps.tooltip:
Includes long jumping sideways to grab awkward ledges, and long jumping as Zora or Fierce Deity
with Blast Mask.

Difficult Goron Spike Rolls.tooltip: Use precise movement with Goron Spikes to get to hard-to-reach areas.

GBT Hookless Exit.tooltip: Leave Great Bay Temple without Hookshot by carefully negotiating with the turtle's geometry.

WFT Bow Skip.tooltip: Open the barred doors leading to the pre-boss room of Woodfall Temple with a lit Deku Stick.

Remote Hookshot.tooltip: "Store" a hookshot target by drinking milk after pulling hookshot holding an empty bottle.

Harder Enemy Interactions.tooltip: Utilize enemies to perform difficult tricks. Not compatible with randomized enemies!

Superslide.tooltip: Preserve recoil momentum after taking damage during roll invulnerability frames.

Weirdshot.tooltip: Use Hookshot during the distortion caused by rolling into an explosion.

WFT Gekko Quick Kill.tooltip: Kill the WFT Gekko with bombs and jump slashing.

WFT Megapound.tooltip:
During Deku void invulnerability frames, get hit by an explosion while Goron Pounding to get to the
2nd floor of Woodfall Temple.

Precise Zora Jumps.tooltip: Precise Zora Jumps outside of Snowhead Temple.

WFT BK Skip.tooltip: Skip the boss key for Woodfall Temple.

Zora Clips.tooltip: Clip into ledges and walls as Zora.

Open Upside-Down Chests.tooltip: Open chests in ISTT from STT, and vice-versa, with hovering.

STT Sun Block Clip.tooltip: Clip past the sun block in front of the Compass Chest in STT and ISTT.

Equip Swap.tooltip: Equip items over the trade item slot, or the 6th bottle slot.

STT Underwater Sun Switch Snipe.tooltip: Hit the underwater sun switch in STT with a Light Arrow shot off a sidehop.

Extremely Long Bomb Hovers.tooltip:
Bomb hovers with many, many explosives, usually only possible with Blast Mask (Instant Blast Mask
Cooldown recommended!)

Path to Snowhead With Nothing.tooltip: Get through Path to Snowhead by mashing jump slashes on the edges of the gaps.

Mountain Village Early Seamwalk.tooltip: Carefully walk up the slope and around the ice blocking Path to Mountain Village.

Epona Push.tooltip: Get pushed by Epona's idle animation and amplifying the collision interaction with pause buffering.

Beneath the Well Sun Block Clip.text: Beneath the Well Sun Block Clip
Beneath the Well Sun Block Clip.tooltip: Clip through the sun block at the end of Beneath the Well with bombs and Zora Mask or FD Anywhere.

Zora Hall Doors as Human.tooltip: Get past the Zoras in front of Lulu's room and Evan's room with a twisted backflip.

Honey and Darling Three Days without Bow.text: Honey and Darling Three Days without Bow
Honey and Darling Three Days without Bow.tooltip:
Prevent yourself by getting kicked out of the minigame by pause buffering,
and complete the day 2 minigame during the transition to Day 3.

Flip Stone Tower Without Elegy.tooltip: Shoot a Light Arrow at the red emblem and roll over the correct switch nearly simultaneously.

Ikana Castle Seamwalk.tooltip: Seamwalk to the top of the castle from the castle's corner on the right side.

Enter Pirates' Fortress Sewers as Deku.text: Enter Pirates' Fortress Sewers as Deku
Enter Pirates' Fortress Sewers as Deku.tooltip: Clip into the Sewers from behind by voiding into a water stream as Deku.

Ignore Fire Rings.tooltip: Cleverly open chests surrounded by fire.

Momentary Anti-Gravity.tooltip: Slide into the corner of a roof to obtain momentary anti-gravity.

Day 2 Grave Clip.tooltip:
Get on top of the Day 2 Grave, then slide inside by reading the grave from above.
Or simply unload the grave.

Day 3 Grave Clip.tooltip: Ocarina dive into the grave from above, or read the grave from above with extreme precision.

Leever Hover.tooltip: Get into Great Bay Coast early with only a shield.

Termina Field Boulder Clip.tooltip: Get in grottos underneath boulders in Termina Field during a day/night transition.

Business Scrub Flower Theft.tooltip: Damage boost into flowers occupied by business scrubs.

GBT BK Skip.tooltip: Clip out of bounds as Zora and simply swim to the unloaded boss door, or hover there instead.

Bio Baba Hive Luck.tooltip: Hope the item lands on a lilypad.

Lullaby Skip.tooltip: Skip playing Goron Lullaby to enter Snowhead Temple using either Goron Spikes or a HESS.

Dog Race Luck.tooltip: Removes Mask of Truth as a requirement for Dog Race.

WFT Recoil Jump.tooltip: Jump to WFT 2nd Floor as human with only a bomb and a Bombchu.

Weirdshot Off a Powder Keg Explosion.text: Weirdshot Off a Powder Keg Explosion
Weirdshot Off a Powder Keg Explosion.tooltip: Exactly as the trick name describes. Try your best to not crash your game trying this!

Recoil Flip Off Enemies.tooltip: Recoil flip off enemies. Very precise!

Flip Stone Tower Without Light Arrows.text: Flip Stone Tower Without Light Arrows
Flip Stone Tower Without Light Arrows.tooltip: Flip Stone Tower by dropping water above the red emblem.

Damage Boosting.tooltip: Take damage in midair from any source of damage for a small boost.

Enter Secret Shrine Without Light Arrows.text: Enter Secret Shrine Without Light Arrows
Enter Secret Shrine Without Light Arrows.tooltip: Drop water from very high above the sun switch to activate it.

Stone Tower Death Armos Maze Chest.text: Stone Tower Death Armos Maze Chest
