DirectToCredits.tooltip:
Once the custom victory condition(s) is/are fulfilled, begin the credits as soon as possible.
Otherwise, you must fulfill the condition(s) and then defeat Majora.

CantFightMajora.tooltip:
When enabled, speaking to the Moon Child who is wearing Majora's Mask will send you back in time if
you haven't fufilled the victory condition(s). When disabled, defeating Majora will send you back
in time if you haven't fulfilled the victory condition(s).

Fairies.tooltip: Have 15 of each dungeon stray fairy.

SkullTokens.tooltip: Have 30 of each type of skulltula token.

OneBossRemains.tooltip: Have one of the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

TwoBossRemains.tooltip: Have two of the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

ThreeBossRemains.tooltip: Have three of the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

FourBossRemains.tooltip: Have all the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

Purchases.tooltip: Prices for item purchases will be randomized.

Minigames.tooltip: Prices for minigames will be randomized.

Misc.tooltip: Prices for other miscellaneous spending will be randomized.

AccountForRoyalWallet.tooltip:
Price randomization will range from 1-999 instead of 1-500. Any shuffled or non-randomized price
will double.

ShuffleOnly.tooltip:
Prices will only be shuffled among each other. Must enable Puchases, Minigames or Misc for this
setting to have any effect.

GreatFairyRewards.tooltip:
Boss Remains will be placed on the reward for collecting 15 stray fairies of their dungeon.
Great Fairy Rewards must be randomized for this to take effect.

ShuffleOnly.tooltip:
Boss Remains will be shuffled among each other. You still need to randomize them in the Item
Randomization tab.

KeepWithinTemples.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into any temple.

KeepWithinArea.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into a location in or near the
temple its boss is in.

KeepWithinOverworld.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into an overworld location.

Blitz1.tooltip:
Start with 1 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temple with that boss will be forced
to be junk.

Blitz2.tooltip:
Start with 2 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temples with those bosses will be
forced to be junk.

Blitz3.tooltip:
Start with 3 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temples with those bosses will be
forced to be junk.

Blitz4.tooltip: Start with all boss remains. Locations in and after temples will be forced to be junk.

DoorsOpen.tooltip:
Boss doors will always be open. Boss Keys in the item pool will be replaced with other items.
Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.

GreatFairyRewards.tooltip:
Boss Keys will be placed on the reward for collecting 15 stray fairies of their dungeon.
Great Fairy Rewards must be randomized for this to take effect.

KeepWithinTemples.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into any temple.

KeepWithinArea.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into a location in or near the temple
it's used in.

KeepWithinOverworld.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into an overworld location.

KeepThroughTime.tooltip: Boss Keys will go back in time with Link.

DoorsOpen.tooltip:
Small Key doors will always be open. Small Keys in the item pool will be replaced with other items.
Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.

KeepWithinTemples.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into any temple.

KeepWithinArea.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into a location in or near the temple
they're used in.

KeepWithinOverworld.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into an overworld location.

KeepThroughTime.tooltip: Small Keys will go back in time with Link. Any used Small Keys will return to Link's inventory.

ChestsOnly.tooltip:
Stray Fairies in the item pool will be replaced with other items.
Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.
Non-chest fairies (roaming, bubbles, beehives, etc.) are removed.
Chests that ordinarily have a Stray Fairy will behave like normal chests.

KeepWithinTemples.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into any temple.

KeepWithinArea.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into a location in or near the
fairy fountain they originate from.

KeepWithinOverworld.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into an overworld location.

KeepWithinTemples.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Dungeon Maps and Compasses into any temple.

KeepWithinArea.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Dungeon Maps and Compasses into a location in or
near the temple they're for.

KeepWithinOverworld.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Dungeon Maps and Compasses into an overworld
location.

MapRevealsLocation.tooltip: Finding a Dungeon Map will tell you the location of the dungeon.

CompassRevealsBoss.tooltip: Finding a Compass will tell you which boss is in the dungeon.

GameplaySettings.RandomizeDungeonEntranc.tooltip:
Enable randomization of dungeon entrances.

Stone Tower Temple is always vanilla, but Inverted Stone Tower Temple is randomized.

GameplaySettings.AddSongs.tooltip: Enable songs being placed among items in the randomization pool.

GameplaySettings.StartingItemMode.tooltip:
Select a starting item mode:

None - You will not start with any randomized starting items.
Random - You will start with randomized starting items.
Allow Temporary Items - You will start with randomized starting items including Keg, Magic Bean and Bottles with X.

GameplaySettings.RandomizeBossRooms.tooltip: Enable randomization of boss rooms. The boss door texture will match the boss behind the door.

GameplaySettings.RandomizeEnemies.tooltip: Enable randomization of enemies. May cause softlocks in some circumstances, use at your own risk.

GameplaySettings.RequiredBossRemains.tooltip: Set the number of Boss Remains required to proceed through the final Giants cutscene.

GameplaySettings.ProgressiveUpgrades.tooltip:
Enable swords, wallets, magic, bomb bags, quivers and the Goron Lullaby to be found in the intended
order.

GameplaySettings.MovementMode.tooltip:
Select a movement modifier:

- Default: No movement modifier.
- High speed: Link moves at a much higher velocity.
- Super low gravity: Link can jump very high.
- Low gravity: Link can jump high.
- High gravity: Link can barely jump.

GameplaySettings.FloorType.tooltip:
Select a floortype for every floor ingame:

- Default: Vanilla floortypes.
- Sand: Link sinks slowly into every floor, affecting movement speed.
- Ice: Every floor is slippery.
- Snow: Similar to sand.
- Random: Any random floortypes of the above.

GameplaySettings.ContinuousDekuHopping.tooltip: Press A while hopping across water to keep hopping.

GameplaySettings.HookshotAnySurface.tooltip: Hookshot can hook to any surface.

GameplaySettings.IronGoron.tooltip: Goron Link will sink in water instead of drowning.

GameplaySettings.AutoInvert.tooltip: Auto-invert time at the start of a cycle.

GameplaySettings.TrapAmount.tooltip: Amount of ice traps to be added to pool by replacing junk items.

GameplaySettings.TrapAppearance.tooltip: Appearance of ice traps in pool for world models.

GameplaySettings.TrapQuirks.tooltip: Ice traps will behave slightly differently from other items in certain situations.

Ice.tooltip: Ice traps freeze the player in ice, dealing damage over a few seconds or voiding Zora.

Bomb.tooltip: Bomb traps explode in the player's position, dealing damage and knocking them back.

Rupoor.tooltip: Rupoors take 10 rupees from your wallet.

GameplaySettings.DamageMode.tooltip:
Select a damage mode, affecting how much damage Link takes:

- Default: Link takes normal damage.
- 2x: Link takes double damage.
- 4x: Link takes quadruple damage.
- 1-hit KO: Any damage kills Link.
- Doom: Hardcore mode. Link's hearts are slowly being drained continuously.

GameplaySettings.DamageEffect.tooltip:
Select an effect to occur whenever Link is being damaged:

- Default: Vanilla effects occur.
- Fire: All damage burns Link.
- Ice: All damage freezes Link.
- Shock: All damage shocks link.
- Knockdown: All damage knocks Link down.
- Random: Any random effect of the above.

GameplaySettings.DeathMoonCrash.tooltip: Dying causes the moon to crash, with all that that implies.

GameplaySettings.FewerHealthDrops.tooltip:
Recovery Hearts will not drop, and re-acquiring random items will turn into Green Rupees instead.
Fairies will not heal except on death.

GameplaySettings.ByoAmmo.tooltip:
Arrows, Bombs, and Bombchu will not be provided for minigames. You must bring your own.
Logic Modes other than No Logic will account for this.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageOnEpona.tooltip: Instead of being immune to damage while riding Epona, Link will take damage and be thrown off.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageWhileShieldin.tooltip: Link will take damage when being hit on his shield, and can't recoil off damage to the shield.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromVoid.tooltip: Link will take damage when falling into voids or voiding out in water.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromGorons.tooltip: Link will take damage when being hit by Gorons during the Goron Race.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromGibdosFas.tooltip: Gibdos will deal damage immediately after grabbing Link.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageGettingCaught.tooltip:
Getting thrown out after being caught by guards will deal damage.
Being thrown out after getting the reward from the Imprisoned Monkey will not deal damage.

GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromDexihands.tooltip: Link will take damage from Dexihands.

GameplaySettings.BlastMaskCooldown.tooltip: Adjust the cooldown timer after using the Blast Mask.

GameplaySettings.NutandStickDrops.tooltip:
Adds Deku nuts and Deku sticks to drop tables in the field:

- Default: No change, vanilla behavior.
- Light: one stick and nut 1/16 chance termina bush.
- Medium: More nuts, twice the chance
- Extra: More sticks, more nuts, more drop locations.
- Mayhem: You're crazy in the coconut!

GameplaySettings.EnableSunsSong.tooltip:
Enable using the Sun's Song, which speeds up time to 400 units per frame (normal time speed is 3
units per frame) until dawn or dusk or a loading zone.

GameplaySettings.FreeScarecrow.tooltip: Spawn scarecrow automatically when using ocarina if within range.

GameplaySettings.AllowFierceDeityAnywher.tooltip:
Allow the Fierce Deity's Mask to be used anywhere. Also addresses some softlocks caused by Fierce
Deity.

GameplaySettings.GiantMaskAnywhere.tooltip: Allows the Giant's Mask to be used anywhere with a high enough (or no) ceiling.

GameplaySettings.InstantTransform.tooltip:
Transforming using Deku Mask, Goron Mask, Zora Mask and Fierce Deity's Mask will be almost instant.
These items can no longer be used as "cutscene items".

GameplaySettings.BombArrows.tooltip: Use a bomb while an arrow is out when using the bow to attach the bomb to the tip of the arrow.

GameplaySettings.VanillaMoonTrialAccess.tooltip:
Entering the trials on the Moon will require masks, as per the vanilla behavior,
but this is not considered by logic. Without this enabled, the trials will not require any masks to
enter.

GameplaySettings.Character.tooltip: Select a character model to replace Link's default model.

GameplaySettings.SpeedupDampe.tooltip: Change Dampe ghost flames to always have two on the ground floor and one up the ladder.

GameplaySettings.SpeedupLabFish.tooltip: Change Lab Fish to only need to be fed one fish.

GameplaySettings.SpeedupBank.tooltip:
Change the Bank reward thresholds to 200/500/1000 instead of 200/1000/5000.
Also reduces maximum bank capacity from 5000 to 1000.

GameplaySettings.SpeedupBeavers.tooltip: Modify Beavers to not have to race the younger beaver.

GameplaySettings.SpeedupDogRace.tooltip: Make Gold Dog always win if you have the Mask of Truth.

GameplaySettings.DoubleArcheryRewards.tooltip: Grant both archery rewards with a sufficient score.

GameplaySettings.SpeedupBabyCuccos.tooltip: Makes the location of baby cuccos show on the minimap.

GameplaySettings.HintsIndicateImportance.tooltip: Location hints indicate the importance of the item.

GameplaySettings.MixGossipAndGaroHints.tooltip: Garo hints distribution and gossip hint distribution will be mixed together.

Web.HintPriorities.tooltip: Customize hint priority tiers for competitive hint generation

GameplaySettings.OverrideHintPriorities.tooltip:
If any locations are provided, this list will be used exclusively for determining hint priorities.
Settings are not taken into account, but non-randomized and junked locations will not be hinted.
The higher a location appears in this list, the higher its priority.
Locations with the same priority will be chosen randomly. If a location should combine with another
location, all the combined locations should be added.

GameplaySettings.OverrideImportanceIndic.tooltip: Make chosen tiers of hints indicate their importance.

GameplaySettings.OverrideHintItemCaps.tooltip:
The number (if non-zero) indicates how many of the locations in the tier will be hinted,
and the rest will be forced to be junk.

GameplaySettings.RemainsHint.tooltip:
At the entrance to the Clock Tower Interior, Tatl will prompt to speak and will tell you the
regions where the Boss Remains are located.

GameplaySettings.OathHint.tooltip:
When you take the boss warp after defeating a temple boss, if you have enough boss remains to go to the moon and do not have Oath to Order then a cutscene will play in which the Giants reveal to you the region where the Oath to Order is located.

If Mix Songs With Items is disabled, they will instead reveal the region of the Powder Keg, Captain's Hat, Mirror Shield, Deku Mask, Goron Mask or Zora Mask, depending on where the Oath to Order is.

GameplaySettings.FairyAndSkullHint.tooltip:
The cursed man in the Swamp Spider House, and the Green Shirt Man in the Ocean Spider House will tell you the regions of the remaining spider tokens. The Green Shirt Man in the Ocean Spider House will appear there when you blow up the entrance wall.

Each fairy fountain (including Clock Town) will tell you the regions of the remaining Stray Fairies.

GameplaySettings.GossipHintStyle.tooltip:
Select a Gossip Stone hint style

- Default: Vanilla Gossip Stone hints.
- Random: Hints will contain locations of random items.
- Relevant: Hints will contain locations of items loosely related to the vanilla hint or the area.
- Competitive: Guaranteed hints about time-consuming checks, and hints regarding importance or non-importance of regions

GameplaySettings.FreeHints.tooltip: Enable reading gossip stone hints without requiring the Mask of Truth.

GameplaySettings.ClearHints.tooltip: Gossip stone hints will give clear item and location names.

GameplaySettings.ImportanceCount.tooltip:
Gossip stone hints that normally give a Way of the Hero hint will instead tell you the number of
important items in the region. Foolish hints will say zero important items.
Foolish Except The Song hints will say one important song.

GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfRequire.tooltip: Set the number of Way of the Hero hints that will appear on Gossip Stones.

GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfNonRequ.tooltip: Set the number of Foolish hints that will appear on Gossip Stones.

GameplaySettings.OverrideMaxNumberOfCloc.text: Override Max Clock Town Gossip Hints
GameplaySettings.OverrideMaxNumberOfCloc.tooltip:
Set the maximum number of Way of the Hero hints on Gossip Stones that can be for a Clock Town
region (including Laundry Pool).

GameplaySettings.GaroHintStyle.tooltip:
Select a Garo hint style

- Default: Vanilla Garo hints.
- Random: Hints will contain locations of random items.
- Relevant: Hints will contain locations of items loosely related to the vanilla hint or the area.
- Competitive: Guaranteed hints about time-consuming checks, and hints regarding importance or non-importance of regions.

GameplaySettings.FreeGaroHints.tooltip: Enable fighting Garos by speaking to Tatl instead of wearing the Garo's Mask.

GameplaySettings.ClearGaroHints.tooltip: Garo hints will give clear item and location names.

GameplaySettings.ImportanceCountGaro.tooltip:
Garo hints that normally give a Way of the Hero hint will instead tell you the number of important
items in the region. Foolish hints will say zero important items.
Foolish Except The Song hints will say one important song.

GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfRequire.tooltip: Set the number of Way of the Hero hints that will appear on Garos.

GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfNonRequ.tooltip: Set the number of Foolish hints that will appear on Garos.

GameplaySettings.OverrideMaxNumberOfCloc.text: Override Max Clock Town Garo Hints
GameplaySettings.OverrideMaxNumberOfCloc.tooltip:
Set the maximum number of Way of the Hero hints on Garos that can be for a Clock Town region
(including Laundry Pool).

GameplaySettings.CritWiggleDisable.tooltip: Disable crit wiggle movement modification when 1 heart of health or less.

GameplaySettings.QuickTextEnabled.tooltip: Enable quick text. Dialogs are fast-forwarded to choices/end of dialog.

GameplaySettings.FastPush.tooltip: Increase the speed of pushing and pulling blocks and faucets.

GameplaySettings.CloseCows.tooltip:
When playing Epona's Song for a group of cows, the closest cow will respond,
instead of the default behavior.

GameplaySettings.EnablePictoboxSubject.tooltip: Display extra text showing which type of picture was captured by the Pictobox.

GameplaySettings.LenientGoronSpikes.tooltip: Goron spikes can charge midair and keep their charge. Minimum speed for goron spikes is removed.

GameplaySettings.TargetHealthBar.tooltip: Targeting an enemy shows their health bar.

GameplaySettings.FillWallet.tooltip: Fills wallet with max rupees upon finding a wallet upgrade.

GameplaySettings.HiddenRupeesSparkle.tooltip: Hit Tags and Invisible Rupees will emit a sparkle.

GameplaySettings.SaferGlitches.tooltip:
Makes it safer to use glitches:
- Prevents HESS crash
- Prevents Weirdshot crash
- Prevents Action Swap crash
- Prevents Song of Double Time softlock during 0th or 4th day
- Prevents Tatl text softlock on 0th of 4th day
- Prevents 0th day file deletion
- Prevents hookslide crash
- Prevents softlocks when using Remote Hookshot
- Prevents 0th day Goron Bow crash
- Applies safety fixes for Fierce Deity even if Fierce Deity Anywhere is not enabled
- Index warp no longer crashes or softlocks (but you won't be able to use it to access the Debug Menu)
- Prevents softlocks when interrupting mask transformations
- Mayor is removed on 4th day
- Deku Playground Employees are removed on 4th day
- Prevents Gossip Stone time from crashing on 4th day
- Prevents Town Shooting Gallery from crashing on 0th day and 4th day

GameplaySettings.EasyFrameByFrame.tooltip: Hold Start while unpausing to pause again after one frame passes.

GameplaySettings.ChestGameMinimap.tooltip:
Draws a minimap during the Treasure Chest Game if you have the Map of Clock Town:

- Off: No minimap, default vanilla behaviour.
- Minimal: Minimap is displayed, blocks appear on minimap when triggered.
- Conditional Spoiler: Minimal behaviour, and if the Mask of Truth is aquired along with Map of Clock Town, spoil the maze layout.
- Spoiler: Only Map of Clock Town needed to spoil the maze layout.

GameplaySettings.UpdateShopAppearance.tooltip: Shops models and text will be updated to match the item they give.

GameplaySettings.UpdateChests.tooltip: Chest appearance will be updated to match the item they contain.

GameplaySettings.UpdateWorldModels.tooltip:
Show world models as their actual item instead of the original item.
This includes Pieces of Heart, Heart Containers, Skulltula Tokens, Stray Fairies,
Moon's Tear and the Seahorse.

GameplaySettings.UpdateNPCText.tooltip: NPC text that refers to items and their locations will be updated.

GameplaySettings.FixEponaSword.tooltip:
Change Epona's B button behavior to prevent you from losing your sword if you don't have a bow.
May affect vanilla glitches that use Epona's B button.

GameplaySettings.QuestItemStorage.tooltip:
Enable Quest Item Storage, which allows for storing multiple quest items in their dedicated
inventory slot. Quest items will also always be consumed when used.

GameplaySettings.KeepQuestTradeThroughTi.tooltip: Quest items will return to your inventory after Song of Time.

GameplaySettings.ArrowCycling.tooltip: Cycle through arrow types when pressing R while an arrow is out when using the bow.

GameplaySettings.ElegySpeedup.tooltip: Applies various Elegy of Emptiness speedups.

GameplaySettings.BombchuDrops.tooltip:
If you have found Bombchu, then any random Bomb drop or fixed non-randomized Bomb drop will have a
chance to drop Bombchu instead. Where relevant, Bombchu packs of 1 and 5 will be in logic in
addition to packs of 10.

GameplaySettings.TolerantGossipStones.tooltip: The angle at which Gossip Stones can be read will be more tolerant.

GameplaySettings.FairyMaskShimmer.tooltip: Nearby stray fairies, even randomized ones, will cause the Great Fairy Mask to shimmer.

GameplaySettings.SkulltulaTokenSounds.tooltip: Nearby skulltula tokens, even randomized ones, will emit a spider crawling sound.

BlastMaskThief.tooltip: You don't have to wait for Sakon to leave.

BoatArchery.tooltip: The minigame will end as soon as you have the required 20 points.

FishermanGame.tooltip: The minigame will end as soon as you have the required 20 points.

MilkBarPerformance.tooltip: Replaying of the music is shortened.

HungryGoron.tooltip: The Hungry Goron doesn't interrupt you when you approach, and you don't have to watch him roll away.

TatlInterrupts.tooltip: Remove most instances of Tatl interrupting your gameplay.

FasterBankText.tooltip: Skips the irrelevant bank text. Allows using Z/R to set deposit/withdraw amount to min/max.

GoronVillageOwl.tooltip:
The owl in Goron Village will no longer trigger dialog when you approach.
You must target it and talk to it if you want it to reveal the path.

AutomaticCredits.tooltip: The dialog of the credits will proceed automatically.

PrincessDelivery.tooltip: The cutscene when delivering the Deku Princess will be skipped.

ShortChestOpening.tooltip: All chests will open using the short animation.

SunMask.tooltip: Shorten various aspects of recovering the Sun Mask.

Tingle.tooltip: You don't have to watch Tingle fall, and his text is shortened.

JimRunning.tooltip: You don't have to watch Jim run away after using the Bombers' code.

Kotake.tooltip:
You don't have to watch Kotake fly into the woods, and don't have to watch her fly away after
giving you an item.

HoldAText.tooltip: Hold A to automatically advance text.

EverythingElse.tooltip: Various cutscenes are skipped or otherwise shortened.

Odolwa.tooltip: Odolwa is ready to fight you right away.

Goht.tooltip: Link doesn't look around in surprise when you enter Goht's room.

Gyorg.tooltip: Gyorg is ready to fight you right away.

Twinmold.tooltip: Twinmold is ready to fight you right away.

Majora.tooltip: Majora is ready to fight you right away.

Wart.tooltip: You don't have to look at Wart to get him down from the ceiling. It spawns on the ground.

IgosDuIkana.tooltip: Igos du Ikana and his henchmen are ready to fight you right away.

Gomess.tooltip: Gomess and his bats are ready to fight you right away.

CosmeticSettings.HeartsSelection.tooltip: Hearts color selection used for HUD color override.

CosmeticSettings.MagicSelection.tooltip: Magic color selection used for HUD color override.

CosmeticSettings.ShiftHueMiscUI.tooltip: Shifts the color of miscellaneous UI elements.

CosmeticSettings.TatlColorSchema.tooltip: Select a color scheme to replace Tatl's default color scheme.

CosmeticSettings.KeepPictoboxAntialiasin.tooltip: Remove anti-aliasing from the Pictobox pictures, which is what makes Pictobox on emulator so slow.

CosmeticSettings.RainbowTunic.tooltip: Link's tunic color will slowly cycle its hue.

CosmeticSettings.BombTrapsRandomizeTunic.tooltip: When you find a Bomb Trap, Link's tunic will randomly change color.

CosmeticSettings.CameraStyle.tooltip:
Select a camera style.

- Default: Vanilla camera.
- Responsive: Link's movement will always be relative to the direction the camera is facing.
- Instant: When Z-Targeting to move the camera behind Link, it will do it very quickly. Camera panning when climbing ledges is also sped up.

CosmeticSettings.RandomizeSounds.tooltip: Randomize sound effects that are played throughout the game.

CosmeticSettings.EnableNightBGM.tooltip:
Enables playing daytime Background music during nighttime in the field.
(Clocktown night music can be weird)

CosmeticSettings.DisableCombatMusic.tooltip: Disables combat music around all regular (non boss or miniboss) enemies in the game.

CosmeticSettings.RemoveMinorMusic.tooltip:
Minor music such as indoors and grottos will not play. Background music that is already playing
will instead continue.

CosmeticSettings.ShowTrackName.tooltip:
When a new track starts playing in-game, show the name of the track at the bottom left of the
screen.

CosmeticSettings.DisableFanfares.tooltip: Replace item fanfares and swamp shooting gallery fanfares with sound effects.

CosmeticSettings.Music.tooltip:
Select a music option

- Default: Vanilla background music.
- None: No background music.

CosmeticSettings.MusicLuckRollChance.tooltip:
Music Rando comes with a chance to accept a song from outside of its categories.
- This controls the percentage chance of a Luck Roll allowing out-of-category music placement
- This is per specific slot+song check
- Only songs with their first category being a general category (0-16) are Luck Rollable.

CosmeticSettings.LowHealthSFX.tooltip:
Select a Low Health SFX setting:

- Default: Vanilla sound.
- Disabled: No sound will play.
- Random: a random SFX will be chosen.
- Specific SFX: a specific SFX will play as the low health sfx.

settings.name: OutputSettings.GenerateSpoilerLog
settings.tooltip:
Output a spoiler log.

The spoiler log contains a list over all items, and their shuffled locations.
In addition, the spoiler log contains version information, seed and settings string used in the randomization.

Google to find it! Do not ask on Discord!

The Wii Common Key is a copyrighted 32 character string needed for WAD encryption.
Google to find it! Do not ask on Discord!

settings.tooltip:
4 characters, should end with E to ensure Dolphin compatibility.
Note: If you have multiple MMR WAD files with different Channel IDs installed, the game can crash on a soft reset. Use a Title Deleter to remove old WADs.

sections.name: preset_section

settings.name: Web.presets
settings.tooltip:
Select a setting preset to apply. You can also save your own presets to use at a later date.
Available Presets:
Season 6:
The competitive settings for MMR Standard Season 6.

Blitz:
Blitz Settings - meant for highly competitive play and short seeds.

Allsanity (in 3 different variants):
The hardest settings you can imagine. Everything is enabled, and different requirements make the difference. Use this if you want to test your limits and how deep your MM knowledge reaches.

Advanced:
A challenge for those who want to prove their knowhow of glitches and strats. These settings expect you to get your items in unorthodox ways more often than not, and hints and mechanics might be more complex than you are used to.

Classic:
Classic MMR Racing settings improved with modern conveniences. Relive season 1/2 settings with a twist.

Modern:
The competitive settings for the previous MMR Standard season, but without a random starting mask.

SG Live 2025:
The competitive settings for the SG Live 2025 tournament.

sections.subheader:
Presets are settings that can be saved and loaded from.
Loading a preset will overwrite all settings that affect the seed.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.LogicMode
settings.tooltip:
Select mode of logic:
- Casual: The randomization logic ensures that the game can be beaten casually.
- Glitched: The randomization logic allows for placement of items that are only obtainable using known glitches.
- Vanilla Layout: All items are left vanilla.
- User Logic: Upload your own custom logic to be used in the randomization.
- No Logic: Completely random, no guarantee the game is beatable. Uses Glitched logic with all tricks enabled for HTML tracker and Blitz junk location calculation.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.UserLogicFileName
settings.tooltip: Path to a custom logic file.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ItemPlacement
settings.tooltip: Select the order that items are placed. If you don't know what this does, just use Random.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.EnabledTricks
default: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth

Casual.name: Lensless Chests
Casual.tooltip:
Open invisible chests without the Lens of Truth; there is one in Lens Cave, Mountain Village,
and Beneath the Well.

Casual.name: Powder Kegs as Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Use Powder Kegs in place of other explosives, for ALL applications of explosives,
including other tricks.

Casual.name: Blast Mask Long Jumps As Zora/FD
Casual.text: Blast Mask Long Jumps As Zora/FD
Casual.tooltip: You may be expected to perform long jumps that require Zora or Fierce Deity Link using Blast Mask.

Casual.name: Skull Kid With Bombs
Casual.tooltip: Hit the Ocarina out of Skull Kid's hand with a well-timed bomb throw.

Casual.name: Skull Kid With Blast Mask
Casual.tooltip: Hit the Ocarina out of Skull Kid's hand with a back flip and a Blast Mask explosion.

Casual.name: Skull Kid With FD
Casual.tooltip: Hit the Ocarina out of Skull Kid's hand with a Fierce Deity Link jump slash.

Casual.name: Straw Roof With Jump Slash
Casual.tooltip: Use a precise jump slash to upwarp on top of the straw roof in South Clock Town for the chest.

Casual.name: Straw Roof as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the lower chest in South Clock Town as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: South Clock Town Final Day Chest as FD
Casual.text: South Clock Town Final Day Chest as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the upper chest in South Clock Town as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: Straw Roof as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
Goron Pound underneath the corner of the straw roof to upwarp on top of it,
then jump to the chest as human link.

Casual.name: Clock Tower Clock With Sword Beams
Casual.text: Clock Tower Clock With Sword Beams
Casual.tooltip:
Hit the Clock Tower clock with a Sword Beam for its items, aiming using the nearby dog to angle the
beam upward.

Casual.name: Clock Tower Clock With Powder Keg
Casual.text: Clock Tower Clock With Powder Keg
Casual.tooltip: Hit the Clock Tower clock for its items by throwing a Powder Keg at it.

Casual.name: Clock Tower Clock With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Hit the Clock Tower clock for its items using a very, very precise Bombchu.

Casual.name: Jump Slash Tingle Balloon
Casual.tooltip: Jump from the tree, and jump slash Tingle's balloon with a sword to take him down.

Casual.name: Keaton Grass Small Spin
Casual.tooltip: Hit more than 5 Keaton bushes with a small sword and quick spin attacks.

Casual.name: Deku Playground Rupee Displacement
Casual.tooltip:
Make the Rupees in Deku Playground fall by repeatedly using transformation masks, trade items,
or the Ocarina of Time.

Casual.name: Deku Playground as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the platforms in the Deku Playground during Day 2 or 3 with a well timed jump as
Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: Deku Playground as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the platforms in the Deku Playground during Day 2 or 3 with a well timed roll as
Goron.

Casual.name: Deku Playground with Goron Spikes
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the platforms in the Deku Playground during Day 1 with a very precisely timed and
aimed Goron Spike Roll.

Casual.name: Bomber Guard Skip
Casual.tooltip: Backflip over the Bomber Hideout Guard.

Casual.name: Guess Bomber Code
Casual.tooltip: 120 combinations.

Casual.name: Inn Balcony Jump
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the Inn balcony as Zora or Adult Link.

Casual.name: Inn Balcony With Cucco
Casual.tooltip: Use a Cucco from the Bombers' Hide and Seek to jump to the Stock Pot Inn balcony.

Casual.name: Inn Balcony With Bombs
Casual.tooltip: Long jump or recoil flip into Stock Pot Inn with explosives.

Casual.name: Inn Balcony as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron Spike Roll into Stock Pot Inn at night for Midnight Meeting. Requires a special setup.

Casual.name: Inn Balcony With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Simply wait on the balcony after 8:30 PM to speak to Anju during the Midnight Meeting.

Casual.name: Postman without Bunny Hood
Casual.tooltip: Get exactly 10 seconds without using the Bunny Hood.

Casual.name: Bank #2 Without Wallets
Casual.tooltip: Bank Reward #2 will not require Adult Wallet or higher.

Casual.name: Bank #3 Without Wallets
Casual.tooltip: Bank Reward #3 will not require Giant Wallet or higher.

Casual.name: Bio Baba Hive Luck
Casual.tooltip: Hope the item lands on a lilypad.

Casual.name: Great Bay Early With Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.text: Great Bay Early With Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.tooltip: Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair to get past the fence blocking Great Bay.

Casual.name: Great Bay Early With Goron Chu Chu Jump
Casual.text: Great Bay Early With Goron Chu Chu Jump
Casual.tooltip: Lure a Chu Chu over to the Great Bay fence to damage boost over the fence as Goron.

Casual.name: Great Bay Early as FD
Casual.tooltip: Long jump over the fence as Fierce Deity with a well-timed jump slash.

Casual.name: Great Bay Early With Only Bombs
Casual.text: Great Bay Early With Only Bombs
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump, jump slash, damage boost using 2 bombs to get over the fence to Great Bay as just Human
Link.

Casual.name: Observatory Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.tooltip: Goron bomb jump over the Astral Observatory fence.

Casual.name: Peahat With Sticks
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Peahat in Termina Field with Deku Sticks. A broken Deku Stick is preferable.

Casual.name: Dodongos With Sticks
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Dodongos in Termina Field with Deku Sticks. A broken Deku Stick is preferable.

Casual.name: Takkuri With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Kill Takkuri with Deku Sticks, or if even Deku Sticks are too hard to come by,
throwing a total of 12 grass at Takkuri will take him down too!

Casual.name: Bio Baba Grotto With Bombs
Casual.tooltip: Destroy the hives in the Bio Baba grotto in Termina Field with explosives.

Casual.name: Termina Field Log Climb
Casual.tooltip:
Climb up one of the ends of the log to get the item above the log with the gimmick Climb Most
Surfaces.

Casual.name: North Ramp Jump
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the invisible item in the gap between the two ramps in northern Termina Field.
Requires either a precise long jump+jump slash combo, or a roll jump as a tall form plus a jump
slash.

Casual.name: Termina Field Clam With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Hit the clam for its items with a Bombchu, or throw explosives at it.

Casual.name: Termina Field Clam With Sword Beams
Casual.text: Termina Field Clam With Sword Beams
Casual.tooltip: Angle a Sword Beam at the clam in Termina Field using clever targeting of a nearby Chu Chu.

Casual.name: Pillar Pot as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the pot and jump slash it as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: Pillar Pot With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Casual.name: Pillar Pot With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside by throwing an explosive at it as Goron/Adult Link.

Casual.name: Pillar Pot With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside by luring a Real Bombchu into it.

Casual.name: Stump Chest With Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.text: Stump Chest With Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.tooltip: Damage boost on top of the stump in Termina Field with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Casual.name: Stump Chest With Goron Spikes
Casual.tooltip:
Perform a precise Goron Spike Roll to take a jump off one of the roots of the stump to get on top
of the stump.

Casual.name: Underwater Chest as Giant
Casual.tooltip: Open the chest as Giant from a precise position.

Casual.name: Avoid Swamp Tree Bat
Casual.tooltip: Kill the other bats, then climb around the final bat with precision.

Casual.name: Road to Swamp Bats With Sticks
Casual.text: Road to Swamp Bats With Sticks
Casual.tooltip: Kill the 3 bats guarding the Heart Piece in the tree with sticks or by throwing grass.

Casual.name: Swamp Tingle as FD
Casual.tooltip: Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity from the top of the tree.

Casual.name: Run Through Poisoned Water
Casual.tooltip: Run through the poison swamp as Zora/FD/Adult/Giant Link.

Casual.name: Poisoned Water as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by rolling as Goron. You aren't guaranteed to have enough health to make it.

Casual.name: Lilypad Parkour as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Go through the poison swamp to Deku Palace, and even the soft soil outside Deku Palace,
as Fierce Deity, without taking any damage!

Casual.name: Big Octo Skip as Deku
Casual.tooltip:
The glitchless Octo skip, for the Octo near the frog. Jump to the left side of the Big Octo,
and sneak past it as Deku with void I-frames.

Casual.name: Big Octo Skip as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Roll from the Tourist Center ledge through the Big Octo as Goron Link.

Casual.name: Big Octo Skip as FD
Casual.tooltip: Simply jump over the Big Octo as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: Big Octo Skip as Adult Link
Casual.text: Big Octo Skip as Adult Link
Casual.tooltip: Recoil flip over the Big Octo near the Tourist Center.

Casual.name: Swamp Poison Water by Climbing
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Big Octo, and climb around the poison swamp with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Casual.name: Recoil Flip to Swamp Spiderhouse with Fairy
Casual.text: Recoil Flip to Swamp Spiderhouse with Fairy
Casual.tooltip:
From the Tourist Center platform, recoil flip over the Big Octo, and swim through the poison swamp
as human Link. A fairy is likely necessary to survive the damage.

Casual.name: Poison Swamp Grotto as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
Get from the Swamp Spiderhouse to the grotto nearby with either a long jump,
or a Goron Pound damage boost off a nearby Dragonfly.

Casual.name: Long Jump to Soaring Tablet
Casual.tooltip:
Backflip onto the lilypad near the large rock, and jump to the rock.
Then, you can long jump from near the Deku Flower to the Song of Soaring tablet as Zora/Adult/FD.

Casual.name: FD Jump to Soaring Tablet
Casual.tooltip:
FD jump from near the Deku Flower to the Song of Soaring tablet.
Sliding off without jumping is very common, but avoidable.

Casual.name: Tourist Center Roof as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Simply Goron Pound underneath the Tourist Center door to warp up on top of the roof.

Casual.name: Tourist Center Roof as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Either sidehop into the door as Fierce Deity Link to get a strange upwarp on top of the roof,
or use a FD Gainer.

Casual.name: Swamp Frog Item Long Jump
Casual.tooltip: Long jump to the blue rupees with explosives.

Casual.name: Swamp Frog Items as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
Damage boost off an Octorok projectile as Goron to get the blue rupees on top of the flowers near
the swamp frog.

Casual.name: Near Frog Hive Flower as Human
Casual.text: Near Frog Hive Flower as Human
Casual.tooltip:
Climb onto the giant flower near this beehive as only Human to reach it with Hookshot or a Bombchu.
You can do a glitchy upwarp onto the flower from the water where the petals of the flower are as
low as they can be.

Casual.name: Near Frog Hive With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Destroy this beehive with a well-placed, well-timed Bombchu.

Casual.name: SSH With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Destroy beehives in Swamp Spider House with Bombchu.

Casual.name: SSH Main Room Ceiling Skull as FD
Casual.text: SSH Main Room Ceiling Skull as FD
Casual.tooltip: Kill the skull from a distance, then jump to the token as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: SSH With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Kill Swamp Skulltulas and break beehives by throwing explosives at them.

Casual.name: SSH Gold Room as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump and climb on top of the left "support pillar" as Fierce Deity to access the beehive and the
Skulltula near the ceiling.

Casual.name: SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull as FD
Casual.text: SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the skull from the scaffolding as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull With Nothing
Casual.text: SSH Monument Room Lower Wall Skull With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Jump slash to kill the skull, then jump slash to collect the skull, using two precise anti-gravity
jumps from the top of the monument, on the lower side.

Casual.name: SSH Vine Skull as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Collect the skull behind the vine through the wall with Zora Fins.

Casual.name: SSH With Blast Mask and Climbing
Casual.text: SSH With Blast Mask and Climbing
Casual.tooltip: Blast some beehives and wall skulls with Blast Mask and the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Casual.name: SSH Boulderless-less
Casual.tooltip: Put bugs in the boulder soft soil spot without actually destroying the boulder.

Casual.name: SSH Tree Room Beehive as FD
Casual.text: SSH Tree Room Beehive as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Blow up the Gossip Stone in the tree room, then use the blast-off animation of the Gossip Stone to
get an angle to hit the beehive with a Sword Beam.

Casual.name: Deku Guard Skip
Casual.tooltip: Backflip over the deku guards from the fence.

Casual.name: Kill Deku Shrine Big Octo
Casual.tooltip:
Kill the Big Octo blocking the Deku Shrine before clearing Woodfall Temple with the Bow, Hookshot,
or Zora Mask.

Casual.name: Deku Palace Bean Skip
Casual.tooltip: Backflip onto the gate, then jump to the fence.

Casual.name: Deku Palace Poison Water Without Deku Mask
Casual.text: Deku Palace Poison Water Without Deku Mask
Casual.tooltip:
Run through the damaging water to the soft soil outside Deku Palace as a non-human form,
taking a lot of damage in the process.

Casual.name: Collect Out of Bounds Item
Casual.tooltip:
Grab the out of bounds item near the entrance to the imprisoned monkey in Deku Palace with a Zora
Boomerang through the wall.

Casual.name: Deku Palace Pots as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump up to the pots.

Casual.name: Deku Palace Pots as Goron With Nothing
Casual.text: Deku Palace Pots as Goron With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Wake up a Deku Scrub by backflipping on the Bean Skip door frame, then damage boost up to the Deku
Palace pots as Goron off the nuts fired by the Deku Scrub.

Casual.name: Bean Grotto as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Put on Giant's Mask underneath the chest on the ledge in Bean Man's grotto to get warped up onto
the ledge.

Casual.name: Woodfall as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump from the Song of Soaring tablet to the entrance of Woodfall, and collect all the items in
Woodfall with clever platforming as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: Woodfall Climbing and Swimming
Casual.tooltip:
After climbing up to Woodfall with the Climb Anywhere Gimmick, you may be expected to do quite a
bit of swimming in the poison water as Human Link.

Casual.name: Woodfall Blue Rupee Without Deku Mask
Casual.text: Woodfall Blue Rupee Without Deku Mask
Casual.tooltip:
A long jump or recoil flip with explosives will work, but you can also recoil flip off a deku scrub
projectile to get this.

Casual.name: WFT 2nd Floor With Hookshot
Casual.tooltip: Hookshot the torch on the right side of the main room, and jump up.

Casual.name: WFT Bow Skip
Casual.tooltip: Open the barred doors leading to the pre-boss room of Woodfall Temple with a lit Deku Stick.

Casual.name: Jump Slash WFT Gekko
Casual.tooltip:
Manipulate where the Gekko will fall off his Snapper, and jump slash it when it tries to climb the
wall.

Casual.name: Dinolfos With Sticks
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Dinolfos in Woodfall Temple with a Deku Stick(s).

Casual.name: WFT Skulltula With Stick
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Skulltula holding a Stray Fairy in Woodfall Temple with a Deku Stick.

Casual.name: WFT Entrance as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump along the platforms to get through the first room as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: WFT 2nd Floor as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump from the Stray Fairy chest spawn in the main room to the 2nd floor as Fierce Deity with
egregious precision.

Casual.name: WFT Elevator Room as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump from the 2nd floor to the room with the Gekko as Fierce Deity, and also jump around the
elevator room in general.

Casual.name: WFT Elevator Jump
Casual.tooltip: Use the eye switch elevator without Deku Mask to get to the 2nd floor.

Casual.name: WFT as Giant Link
Casual.tooltip:
Backflip through the first room, jump to the 2nd floor, jump to the Gekko door,
and jump to the Odolwa door, all as Giant Link.

Casual.name: WFT Jump Slash to 2nd Floor
Casual.tooltip:
Above the main room, perform a jump slash recoil through one of the holes to obtain access to the
main room's 2nd floor.

Casual.name: WFT Carnivorous Flower Jump
Casual.tooltip: Kill the carnivorous flower outside the Snapper room, then jump from the flower to the Snapper room.

Casual.name: WFT Elevator Room Long Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump to the Small Key chest from the top floor, and long jump to the Snapper room from the
elevator.

Casual.name: WFT Long Jump to Odolwa as FD
Casual.text: WFT Long Jump to Odolwa as FD
Casual.tooltip:
In the pre-boss room, jump to the flower platform on the right, then long jump to the Red Rupee on
the right with explosives and Fierce Deity to get to Odolwa's lair.

Casual.name: WFT Odolwa With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Defeat Odolwa with only Bomb Flowers.

Casual.name: WFT Pre-Boss Jumps to Upper Left
Casual.text: WFT Pre-Boss Jumps to Upper Left
Casual.tooltip:
Jump and climb up the ledges leading to the upper left Stray Fairy bubble as Zora/Adult/Fierce
Deity Link.

Casual.name: WFT Stray Fairy Bubbles With Explosives
Casual.text: WFT Stray Fairy Bubbles With Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Pop Stray Fairy bubbles with explosives and Bombchu, for the purpose of collecting them with Great
Fairy's Mask.

Casual.name: WFT Poison Water Bubble With Nothing
Casual.text: WFT Poison Water Bubble With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Grab the fairy by swimming in the poison water. It is theoretically possible to not have enough
health to do this!

Casual.name: WFT Main Room Switch Jump
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the switch from the 2nd floor with a roll jump as human.

Casual.name: WFT Entrance Platform With Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Use a precise Long Jump to the platform with the chest in the first room.
Aim for the Deku Flower to not fall down.

Casual.name: WFT Hives With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Destroy hives in Woodfall Temple with explosives and Bombchu for their items.

Casual.name: WFT Entrance Hive With Jump Slash
Casual.text: WFT Entrance Hive With Jump Slash
Casual.tooltip: Break the beehive in the first room of Woodfall Temple with a sword and a jump slash.

Casual.name: WFT Entrance Hive Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump to the platform nearest the hive. Also, Adult Link can barely make it there with a
precise jump + jump slash.

Casual.name: WFT Red Rupee Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the red rupees on the pillars in the room leading up to Odolwa.
Can be done with either a Long Jump with explosives, Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere,
or clever use of Ice Arrow platforms.

Casual.name: WFT Red Rupees as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
From the door to Odolwa, roll straight into the pillar as Goron, and the red rupee will somehow be
collected.

Casual.name: WFT Crystal Long Jump
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump to the crystal switch in the room before Odolwa. You will only ever possibly need to do
this to collect the red rupee on the right hand side of the room.

Casual.name: Lensless Climbing
Casual.tooltip: Climb the Mountain Village invisible ladder without Lens of Truth.

Casual.name: Snowball Skip With Tall Character
Casual.tooltip:
Avoid the large snowballs in Path to Mountain Village with a Zora/Adult Link backflip or a somewhat
precise backwalk as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: Snowball Skip as Human
Casual.tooltip: Backflip over the large snowballs blocking the way to Mountain Village as only Link.

Casual.name: Smithy Fairy as FD
Casual.tooltip: Hit the pot with a Sword Beam by summoning the scarecrow and targeting it for a good beam angle.

Casual.name: Smithy Fairy With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Casual.name: Smithy Fairy With Powder Keg
Casual.tooltip:
Break the pot with the Fairy inside by throwing a Powder Keg at it, either from your pack,
or from Medigoron during the Powder Keg Challenge.

Casual.name: Twin Islands Items in Winter
Casual.tooltip: Collect the items in the ice in Twin Islands using highly technical Zora Boomerang tricks.

Casual.name: Fish Push
Casual.tooltip:
Drop a fish on the slope leading up to the Goron Racetrack Grotto, and push it up the slope to
prevent yourself from sliding down.

Casual.name: Zoey Grotto Recoil Flip
Casual.tooltip:
Recoil flip up the slope leading to the Goron Racetrack grotto.
You must sidehop out of the snow immediately before the recoil flip

Casual.name: Twin Islands FD Diving
Casual.tooltip:
Dive for the underwater rupees in springtime Twin Islands as Fierce Deity Link.
Simply swim over the items, and hold A.

Casual.name: Goron Racetrack Access as Giant
Casual.tooltip: Climb around the giant boulder as Giant Link, and into the loading zone.

Casual.name: Mountain Tingle as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump slash Tingle's balloon in the mountains as Fierce Deity.
You don't have to stand on the nearby post to get enough height, but it helps.

Casual.name: Powder Keg Challenge Access as FD
Casual.text: Powder Keg Challenge Access as FD
Casual.tooltip: Fierce Deity Link is tall enough to thaw the ice in front of Medigoron's cave with hot spring water.

Casual.name: Goron Village Invisible Platforming Backwards
Casual.tooltip: Get back from Lone Peak Shrine (Lens Cave) using the invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead without Magic
Casual.tooltip: Roll along the sides of the gaps.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead Jumping and Climbing
Casual.text: Path to Snowhead Jumping and Climbing
Casual.tooltip: Long jump and climb across the gaps in Path to Snowhead.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump across the gaps in Path to Snowhead with the Fierce Deity Anywhere gimmick.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead Pillar Without Lens of Truth
Casual.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar Without Lens of Truth
Casual.tooltip: Jump along the invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead Pillar as FD
Casual.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead Pillar as Giant Link
Casual.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar as Giant Link
Casual.tooltip: Jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar as Giant Link.

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead Pillar Long Jump Climb
Casual.text: Path to Snowhead Pillar Long Jump Climb
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar with the Climb Most
Surfaces gimmick.

Casual.name: SHT Tall Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
With Zora Mask, Adult Link, or Fierce Deity, get through the bridge room and the Goron Pound switch
room with some platforming.

Casual.name: SHT Lensless Walls/Ceilings
Casual.tooltip:
Pass through false walls, and also collect Stray Fairies in false walls and ceilings,
without Lens of Truth.

Casual.name: SHT Pillar Skip
Casual.tooltip: Shoot or bomb the snowballs, then jump down.

Casual.name: SHT Jump to Stray Fairies
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the two fairies in the SHT bridge room.

Casual.name: SHT Fireless
Casual.tooltip: Thaw ice with precise arrow shots through torches, and raise the pillar with Flame Storage.

Casual.name: SHT Lensless Map Room Ledge
Casual.tooltip:
Jump along the small invisible platforms leading to the Stray Fairy chest at the top of the Map
room without Lens of Truth.

Casual.name: SHT as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Navigate Snowhead Temple with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.
You can go all the way to the top with just Giant's Mask and a Magic Meter!

Casual.name: SHT Gainers
Casual.tooltip: Use Gainers in Snowhead Temple to climb ledges that are barely out of reach.

Casual.name: SHT Goron Bomb Jumps
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump to ledges that are just barely out of reach in Snowhead Temple.

Casual.name: SHT Long Jumps
Casual.tooltip: Cross gaps in Snowhead Temple with Long Jumps.

Casual.name: SHT Twin Block Goron Pound
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the two blocks stacked on top of eachother with an extremely precise,
nuanced Goron Pound that clips into the corner of the block.

Casual.name: SHT Bridge Room With Bunny Hood
Casual.text: SHT Bridge Room With Bunny Hood
Casual.tooltip:
Get past the bridge room with an extremely precise jump and jump slash as human,
only possible with Bunny Hood.

Casual.name: SHT Elevator Skip as FD
Casual.tooltip: Skip using the elevator that requires Fire Arrows with a jump from the crates as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: SHT Ramps as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump across the ledges with ramps on the 2nd floor as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: SHT Pixelshot
Casual.tooltip: From the first floor, Hookshot the torch in the main room above where the Scarecrow is.

Casual.name: SHT Frozen Switch Clip
Casual.tooltip: In the Compass room, roll into the switch at the right angle to activate it without thawing the ice.

Casual.name: SHT 3F Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
Jump from the top level of the frozen stairwell to the platform with the 3rd locked door,
and also jump from the 3rd locked door to the Goron Pound switch room.

Casual.name: SHT Fireless Pillar Long Jump
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump around the ramps on the 2nd floor in the main room, even if the pillar is raised,
with a tall form and precise Long Jump angles.

Casual.name: SHT Icicle Room Rupees as Zora
Casual.text: SHT Icicle Room Rupees as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Collect the rupees with Zora Boomerangs without breaking the ice.

Casual.name: SHT Fairy Bubbles With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Collect Stray Fairies in Snowhead Temple by popping the bubbles with explosives or Bombchu.

Casual.name: Bowless Aliens
Casual.tooltip: Pause and unpause until 5:15. Logic expects Sun's Song.

Casual.name: Milk Multiple Cows
Casual.tooltip:
Play Epona's Song multiple times in a row for a group of cows before any respond.
Then they will all give you their item.

Casual.name: Dog Race Luck
Casual.tooltip: Removes Mask of Truth as a requirement for Dog Race.

Casual.name: Doggy Racetrack Chest With Jump Slash
Casual.text: Doggy Racetrack Chest With Jump Slash
Casual.tooltip: Use a jump slash to upwarp on top of the awning in the Doggy Racetrack for the chest.

Casual.name: Ranch Tingle With Sword Beams
Casual.tooltip:
Shoot a Sword Beam at Tingle's balloon as Fierce Deity Link.
You can get the right angle by targeting the pickaxe guy between him and the rock, on all 3 days.

Casual.name: Doggy Racetrack Chest With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Climb onto the awning with a precise jump without using a sword to Jump Slash through it.

Casual.name: Coast Ledge Long Jump
Casual.tooltip:
Long Jump from the top of the Hookshot target to the next ledge, then long jump from there to the
Piece of Heart on the next ledge.

Casual.name: Coast Ledge Zora Jump
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the Piece of Heart on the ledge from the higher ledge as Zora or Adult Link.

Casual.name: Coast Ledge as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the highest ledge from the Hookshot target as Fierce Deity, then jump to the ledge for the
Piece of Heart.

Casual.name: Coast Ledge as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Climb to the Hookshot target as Giant Link, then either Zora/Adult Gainer onto the Hookshot target
and Long Jump from there, or do the rest of the platforming as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: Great Bay Cows With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Get hurled up to the cow grotto in Great Bay Coast by a Like Like.

Casual.name: Great Bay Tingle as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity. You will need to cleverly utilize a Bombchu to
target for the right angle.

Casual.name: Exit OSH Without Goron
Casual.tooltip: Backwalk up the slope to exit.

Casual.name: OSH Brute Force Code
Casual.tooltip: Removes Captain's Hat as requirement for Ocean Spider House mask code.

Casual.name: OSH Fireless
Casual.tooltip:
At the entrance, simply hit the skulltula from a precise position.
In the storage room, get on the boat, slash the skulltula, then jump slash to get the token.

Casual.name: OSH Storage Room Clip
Casual.tooltip: In the Ocean Spider House storage room, jump onto the boat and clip through the ceiling.

Casual.name: Enter Ocean Spider House as Goron
Casual.text: Enter Ocean Spider House as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump over the fence in the first room.

Casual.name: Enter Ocean Spider House as Giant
Casual.text: Enter Ocean Spider House as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Destroy the cracked wall with a swing of Giant Link's sword, and also get past the fence in the
first room with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

Casual.name: OSH as Zora
Casual.tooltip:
Collect the tokens from the Skulltulas inside holes in the Oceanside Spider House as Zora with
either boomerangs through walls, or very precise boomerangs into the holes.

Casual.name: OSH as Giant
Casual.tooltip: Collect Skulltula Tokens in holes by jumping out of bounds with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

Casual.name: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Hookshot
Casual.text: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Hookshot
Casual.tooltip: Collect the token through the wall with Hookshot.

Casual.name: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Fish
Casual.text: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Fish
Casual.tooltip: Collect the token through the wall with... a fish??

Casual.name: OSH Entrance Skulls With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Kill the skulls somehow, and collect their tokens with precise sidehops.

Casual.name: OSH Entrance Web Skull as Goron
Casual.text: OSH Entrance Web Skull as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump onto the fence, then Goron Pound and platform up the webs to get to the Skulltula.

Casual.name: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Casual.text: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Casual.tooltip: You can avoid being damaged by the fish by swimming sideways.

Casual.name: Zora Cape as Giant
Casual.tooltip: Climb all the way up to the Waterfall Rapids with tactical jump slashes as Giant Link.

Casual.name: Zora Jar Game with Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Blow up all the pots on the same frame. Can be "buffered" with Ocarina,
or simply done with a well-timed Blast Mask explosion combined with a bomb.

Casual.name: Ocean Great Fairy With Ice Arrows
Casual.text: Ocean Great Fairy With Ice Arrows
Casual.tooltip:
Create ice platforms with Ice Arrows, and climb up to the Ocean Great Fairy as a tall form,
or with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Casual.name: Ocean Great Fairy as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Perform a Zora High Ledge Grab to the small island nearest the grotto,
then jump the rest of the way with Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: Turtle Jump
Casual.tooltip: Jump and "climb" onto the turtle you ride to Great Bay Temple as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: Zora Jar Game With Powder Keg
Casual.text: Zora Jar Game With Powder Keg
Casual.tooltip: Simply place a Powder Keg in the middle and watch it blow up all the jars at once, winning the game.

Casual.name: Zora Cape Recoil Flip
Casual.tooltip: Recoil flip from above the Deku Flower to the Ledge Without Tree Chest.

Casual.name: Like Like With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Like Like under the falls in Zora Cape with Bombchu.

Casual.name: The Giant Dive
Casual.tooltip:
Kill the Like-Like under the falls in Zora Cape from a distance, then dive for the item using
Giant's Mask to grab it as if it was Ruto's Letter.

Casual.name: Lulu's Ledge as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron Pound underneath the ledge with the Heart Piece in Lulu's Room to upwarp on top of it.

Casual.name: Lulu's Ledge as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Climb onto the ledge in Lulu's room by navigating the furniture.

Casual.name: PF Guard Room Rear Entry
Casual.tooltip: Jump from the Hookshot room to the back entrance of the Guard room. Or roll over the roof as Goron.

Casual.name: FD Jump Into PFI
Casual.tooltip: Jump from the pound switch to the railing outside Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Casual.name: Hookshot Room Skull Flag Rupees With Zora Boomerangs
Casual.text: Hookshot Room Skull Flag Rupees With Zora Boomerangs
Casual.tooltip:
Collect the rupees from the skull flag in the Hookshot room without releasing the bees using Zora
Boomerangs through the walls.

Casual.name: Hookshot Room Long Jump to Tank
Casual.text: Hookshot Room Long Jump to Tank
Casual.tooltip: Long jump from the Hookshot chest to the tank with the egg inside.

Casual.name: Sewers With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Navigate through Pirates' Fortress Sewers using Bombchu to hit the crystal switches where available.

Casual.name: Sewers With Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Long Jump to the first crystal switch to raise the metal gate.
With Blast Mask, you can also hit the second crystal switch to activate the water elevator while
simultaneously performing a Long Jump/Recoil Flip to get to the water elevator in time.

Casual.name: Pinnacle Rock without Seahorse
Casual.tooltip: Learn the path and enter Pinnacle Rock without the Seahorse.

Casual.name: GBT Goron Waterwheel
Casual.tooltip: Skip the first yellow turnkey with a precise Goron roll.

Casual.name: GBT Cutscene Diving
Casual.tooltip:
Freeze and unfreeze the water blocking the green pump room to dive to the deeper parts of the
temple without Zora Mask.

Casual.name: GBT as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Pass the water control room as Giant Link. You can also take the mask off in the water in the
whirlpool room to dive to the bottom without Zora Mask.

Casual.name: GBT Whirlpool Access as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Skip using the yellow valve in the water control room to activate the yellow pipe's water stream
platform, by just jumping across as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: GBT Red Pump Long Jump
Casual.tooltip: Long Jump from the pipe to the red water pump turn key (outside Wart room) with explosives.

Casual.name: GBT Red Pump as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the red water pump turn key (outside Wart room) from below as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: GBT Red Valve Early
Casual.tooltip:
Get to the closed red valve room early by bonking off a nearby wall while dolphin diving out of the
water as Zora, and use a Gainer to climb up to the ledge with the turnkey without freezing the Chu
Chu.

Casual.name: GBT Map Chest Room Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
Jump around the platforms in the room with the Map Chest in Great Bay Temple as Zora/Adult
Link/Fierce Deity, or with Long Jumps. In particular, FD can jump to the seesaw room from here.

Casual.name: GBT Red Control Turnkey as FD
Casual.text: GBT Red Control Turnkey as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the platform with the red turnkey in the water control room as Fierce Deity Link from the
rising platform on the left.

Casual.name: GBT Red Control Turnkey With Bombs
Casual.text: GBT Red Control Turnkey With Bombs
Casual.tooltip:
Skip needing Hookshot to use the red turnkey in the water control room by recoil flipping to the
platform. Alternatively, use a Goron Bomb Jump or a Deku shield recoil.

Casual.name: GBT Exit as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the turtle's nose as Fierce Deity with a precise jump from the torches,
then strafe around the nose and up onto the turtle's back.

Casual.name: GBT Exit as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
Goron Bomb Jump onto the turtle's nose from the torches Stray Fairy chest,
then Goron Bomb Jump onto the turtle's back.

Casual.name: GBT Exit With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Exit Great Bay Temple with only sticks, if necessary. Jump slash onto the turtle's nose,
then you can jump slash around the turtle's eye and onto its back.
This trick is very, very unlikely to be required; mostly used to remove exit requirements from
Great Bay Temple in Dungeon Entrance Randomizer.

Casual.name: GBT Green Pump Room Early as FD
Casual.text: GBT Green Pump Room Early as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump around the waterstream blocking the ladder to the green pump room as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: GBT Iceless
Casual.tooltip: Navigate through the waterwheel room without Ice Arrows.

Casual.name: GBT Fireless
Casual.tooltip: Navigate through the seesaw room without Fire Arrows.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Door as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Skip setting up the green pipe water stream platform with a simple jump across the gap to the Great
Bay boss door as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: GBT Iron Goron Sneaks Past Dexihands
Casual.text: GBT Iron Goron Sneaks Past Dexihands
Casual.tooltip:
Get past the Dexihands between the map chest room and the Bio Baba tunnel by quickly swimming
through as human. Also, open the Great Bay Small Key chest by juking out the dexihand there.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Key With Ice Arrows
Casual.text: GBT Boss Key With Ice Arrows
Casual.tooltip: Create an Ice Arrow platform and climb up the window to skip the Gekko fight.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Key With Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump to the Great Bay Boss Key chest with explosives. A tall figure is needed to grab onto the
window.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Key as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Key as Zora/Adult
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest with a highly precise diagonal roll jump
against the wall as Zora or Adult Link.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Key as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
As Giant Link, jump slash to the right of the ice blocking the door from near the Small Key chest
to get to the Boss Key chest with a bizarre clip.

Casual.name: GBT Underwater Hookshot
Casual.tooltip: Hookshot into most of the rooms of Great Bay Temple with the gimmick Hookshot Any Surface.

Casual.name: GBT Boss Key Climb
Casual.tooltip:
Climb into the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces;
requires climbing above the window and jump slashing inside.

Casual.name: GBT Skulltula With Stick
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Skulltula holding a Stray Fairy in Great Bay Temple with a Deku Stick.

Casual.name: GBT Stray Fairy Collection With Bombchu
Casual.text: GBT Stray Fairy Collection With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Release Stray Fairies in Great Bay Temple from jars, barrels, and bubbles using Bombchu.

Casual.name: GBT Water Control Room Underwater Fairy With Nothing
Casual.text: GBT Water Control Room Underwater Fairy With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Get this fairy with two precise dives from the platform with the Skulltula and the rupee triangle.

Casual.name: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy as Zora
Casual.text: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy as Zora
Casual.tooltip:
Jump out of the water at the Stray Fairy underneath the green turnkey in the room before Gyorg as
Zora.

Casual.name: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy Recoil Flip
Casual.text: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy Recoil Flip
Casual.tooltip: Recoil flip into the stray fairy bubble underneath the green turnkey in the room before Gyorg.

Casual.name: GBT Waterwheel Room as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the Stray Fairy chests in the Waterwheel Room as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: GBT Waterwheel Fairy Chests With Explosives
Casual.text: GBT Waterwheel Fairy Chests With Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump to the upper Stray Fairy chest from the rising platform, and recoil flip to the lower
Stray Fairy chest from the horizontally moving platform.

Casual.name: GBT Waterwheel Room Lower Chest With Nothing
Casual.text: GBT Waterwheel Room Lower Chest With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Get into the lower cove with the Stray Fairy chest in the waterwheel room with a very precise
sidehop and a jump slash.

Casual.name: GBT Green Pump Room Climb
Casual.tooltip:
Shimmy up the green pipe to get above the ceiling in the green pump room with the gimmick Climb
Most Surfaces.

Casual.name: GBT Whirlpool Jar as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Break the jar with the Stray Fairy at the bottom of the giant whirlpool with a precise Sword Beam
angled by targeting a Bombchu.

Casual.name: GBT Bio Babas With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Kill all 4 Bio Babas for the Stray Fairy chest with Bombchu.

Casual.name: GBT Dexihands Jar With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Blow up the jar holding this Stray Fairy captive, then collect the Fairy with a surviving Dexihand.

Casual.name: GBT Green Pump Room Giant Upwarp
Casual.text: GBT Green Pump Room Giant Upwarp
Casual.tooltip:
After entering the green pump room, put on Giant's Mask from a precise position to instantly warp
to the ceiling section of the room.

Casual.name: GBT Gyorg Quick Kill
Casual.tooltip:
Skip the cutscene for Gyorg spawning piranhas by finishing it off with Fierce Deity while it is
above the platform.

Casual.name: GBT Gyorg Without Magic
Casual.tooltip: Kill Gyorg using only Zora Link, and no magic.

Casual.name: GBT Gyorg With Arrows
Casual.tooltip: Kill Gyorg with only arrows by sidehopping into the water and shooting arrows at it as you fall in.

Casual.name: GBT Gyorg as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Kill Gyorg with the Iron Goron gimmick.

Casual.name: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bomb Jumps
Casual.text: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bomb Jumps
Casual.tooltip: Self-explanatory. Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair.

Casual.name: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bubble Boosts
Casual.text: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bubble Boosts
Casual.tooltip: Damage boost off the bubbles at night in Road to Ikana with Goron Pounds.

Casual.name: Ikana Canyon Access as FD
Casual.tooltip: Damage boost onto the boulder below the ghost, then climb up with a gainer as Fierce Deity.

Casual.name: Road to Ikana Pot as FD
Casual.text: Road to Ikana Pot as FD
Casual.tooltip: Hit the pot with a Sword Beam by summoning the scarecrow and targeting it for a good beam angle.

Casual.name: Road to Ikana Pot With Bombchu
Casual.text: Road to Ikana Pot With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Casual.name: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth
Casual.text: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth
Casual.tooltip:
Pass the false wall into Day 2 Grave, and cross the section with the invisible floor without Lens
of Truth.

Casual.name: Stun Keeta with Bombs
Casual.tooltip: Use a bomb to stun Captain Keeta before he moves away.

Casual.name: Defeat Dampe Big Poe With Nothing
Casual.text: Defeat Dampe Big Poe With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
You can lure the Big Poe to the stairs for a clean shot at jump slashing it with your best sword,
or Deku Sticks.

Casual.name: Defeat Keeta With Sticks
Casual.tooltip:
Beat Keeta with only a single broken Deku Stick. You can either fight through the Stalchildren,
which is tight on time, or simply mash backflip up the slope near the Captain's Hat chest and
intercept Keeta.

Casual.name: Keeta as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Defeat Keeta without stunning him as Goron Link by getting through the Stalchildren quickly.

Casual.name: Ikana Graveyard Rocks Without Sonata
Casual.tooltip:
Get on the other side of Keeta without waking him up by performing a very precise Goron Pound onto
a lantern above the door to Dampe's hut, backflip a little higher, then do a twisted backflip as
human to climb up.

Casual.name: Ikana Graveyard Bats With Sticks and Bombs
Casual.text: Ikana Graveyard Bats With Sticks and Bombs
Casual.tooltip:
Kill the bats in Day 1 grave with only sticks, and kill all the bats around the graveyard on day 2
with sticks and bombs.

Casual.name: Ikana Canyon Iceless
Casual.tooltip: Hookshot to the first stump from a precise position.

Casual.name: Poe Hut With Bombs and Sticks
Casual.text: Poe Hut With Bombs and Sticks
Casual.tooltip:
Defeat the first three Poes with Deku Sticks, then simply blow up the last Poe with bombs or Blast
Mask.

Casual.name: Canyon Ledge as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the Piece of Heart as Fierce Deity, with moderate precision required.

Casual.name: Canyon Tingle as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity. You will need to cleverly utilize a Bombchu or a
Guay to target for the right angle.

Casual.name: Defeat Well Big Poe With Bombs
Casual.text: Defeat Well Big Poe With Bombs
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Big Poe in the Well by simply throwing bombs at it.

Casual.name: Pacifist Well Hot Spring Water
Casual.tooltip:
Collect Hot Spring Water in the Well without killing the Dexihand by quickly scooping the water
from behind it, and soaring away.

Casual.name: Wallmaster Void Out
Casual.tooltip:
Bring Hot Spring Water from the Dexihand to the Well Cow by allowing a Wallmaster to grab you and
take you back to the Ikana Castle side of the well.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Invisible Platform Without Lens of Truth
Casual.text: Ikana Castle Invisible Platform Without Lens of Truth
Casual.tooltip: Navigate the single invisible ice platform in Ikana Castle without Lens of Truth.

Casual.name: Igos Fight Swordless
Casual.tooltip: Defeat Igos du Ikana with Deku Sticks or something like Ice Arrows.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Gainer
Casual.tooltip: Perform a Gainer over the sun block blocking Ikana Castle.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Access as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump over the sun block blocking Ikana Castle.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Get through the left side of Ikana Castle as Fierce Deity Link, and also jump to the Castle Pillar
Heart Piece without Deku Mask.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Zora/Adult Link
Casual.text: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Zora/Adult Link
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the falling ceiling as Zora or Adult Link with either a Gainer or a sidehop jump
slash, then climb to the switch that unlocks the barred doors.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Human
Casual.text: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Human
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the falling ceiling with either a Gainer or a sidehop jump slash,
raise the ceiling by shooting one of the crystal switches with bow, then ride the ceiling up to the
switch that unlocks the barred doors.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Pillar as Goron
Casual.tooltip:
Goron Bomb Jump onto the railing of the side of the castle, then navigate along the railing and
sidehop to the Piece of Heart.

Casual.name: Ikana Castle Hole Room Jumps
Casual.tooltip:
Jump to the pots in the hole room of Ikana Castle as human, and jump around the Skulltulas while
doing the room in reverse.

Casual.name: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Casual.text: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Casual.tooltip: Play Elegy while on a block to ride the block up.

Casual.name: Climb Stone Tower as FD
Casual.tooltip: Skip half of the Elegy of Emptiness switches with Fierce Deity Link's jumps.

Casual.name: Climb Stone Tower as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Climb the entirety of Stone Tower with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.
Requires a sword for jump slashing.

Casual.name: Flip Stone Tower Without Elegy
Casual.tooltip:
Shoot a Light Arrow with a precise shot, combined with a precise roll to manipulate one of the
Elegy of Emptiness blocks out of the way of the shot.

Casual.name: Stone Tower Bean Chests as Giant
Casual.text: Stone Tower Bean Chests as Giant
Casual.tooltip: Jump slash to the bean chests as Giant Link.

Casual.name: STT Elegy Maze With Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Break the cracked wall with a Real Bombchu detonation.

Casual.name: STT Water Tunnel as Human
Casual.tooltip:
Swim through the underwater tunnel with a precise roll jump dive inside.
Hold A for the deepest possible dive.

Casual.name: STT Elegy Maze Climb
Casual.tooltip: Climb over the exit game in the maze with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces enabled.

Casual.name: STT as Giant
Casual.tooltip: Navigate through uninverted Stone Tower Temple with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere enabled.

Casual.name: STT Eyegore Bridge as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Dolphin dive onto the Eyegore bridge as Zora Link with a precise bonk.

Casual.name: STT Eyegore Bridge With Explosives
Casual.tooltip:
Get on top of the railing or sunblock in the Eyegore room, then Recoil Flip or Long Jump onto the
bridge. Alternatively, Goron Bomb Jump onto the bridge from an Ice Arrow ice platform.

Casual.name: STT Gainers
Casual.tooltip: Gainer onto the sun block in Stone Tower Temple with sufficiently tall transformations.

Casual.name: STT Eyegore Bridge as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump onto the Eyegore Bridge as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: STT Updraft Room With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Recoil flip through the updraft room with explosives.

Casual.name: STT Updraft Room as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump through the updraft room as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: STT Updraft Room With Powder Keg
Casual.text: STT Updraft Room With Powder Keg
Casual.tooltip:
Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then use a Powder Keg to Recoil Flip
through the other 2 sets of updrafts.

Casual.name: STT Updraft Room as Goron/Zora
Casual.tooltip:
Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then use a Zora Jump Slash recoil to
fly through the other 2 sets of updrafts.

Casual.name: STT Lava Room Ledge as Zora
Casual.text: STT Lava Room Ledge as Zora
Casual.tooltip:
Perform an incredibly precise Zora Jump Slash in the first updraft to barely make it onto this
ledge.

Casual.name: STT Lava Room Ledge as Goron
Casual.text: STT Lava Room Ledge as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then hookshot the chest.

Casual.name: STT Eyegore Bridge to Courtyard
Casual.tooltip:
Jump slash onto the railing of the bridge, and then cross the water with either Deku Mask,
Ice Arrows, or a Recoil Flip.

Casual.name: STT Garo Master With Sticks
Casual.tooltip: Defeat the Garo Master in Stone Tower Temple with Deku Sticks.

Casual.name: STT Map Chest Recoil Flip
Casual.tooltip: From the basement ledge, use a precise curved Recoil Flip to land on top of the sun block.

Casual.name: STT Basement Ledge Jump Slash Recoil
Casual.text: STT Basement Ledge Jump Slash Recoil
Casual.tooltip:
Get onto the basement ledge by falling down the hole in the ceiling, and using a Jump Slash wall
recoil to land on the ledge.

Casual.name: STT Basement Ceiling With Real Bombchu
Casual.text: STT Basement Ceiling With Real Bombchu
Casual.tooltip: Blow up the hole in the ceiling of the basement room with a Real Bombchu from the maze.

Casual.name: STT Map Chest as Zora
Casual.tooltip:
Jump Slash the wall in the ceiling hole as Zora Link to recoil off and land on the sun block in the
basement.

Casual.name: STT Map Chest as FD
Casual.tooltip: From the basement ledge, jump on top of the sun block.

Casual.name: STT Armos With Nuts
Casual.tooltip:
Lure the Armos behind the sun block in the basement room closer with Deku Nuts,
then kill them through the wall.

Casual.name: STT Armos With Bombchu
