Casual.tooltip: Kill the Armos behind the sun block in the basement room with Bombchu.

Casual.name: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as Zora
Casual.text: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Hit the switch through the floor with Zora Boomerangs.

Casual.name: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as FD
Casual.text: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump slash the crystal through the wall as Fierce Deity Link.
Alternatively, target the Hiploop and shoot a sword beam at the crystal from below.

Casual.name: STT Thin Bridge Crystal With Nothing
Casual.text: STT Thin Bridge Crystal With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Jump slash the crystal through the wall with as little as a Deku Stick.

Casual.name: STT Underwater Sun Switch Snipe
Casual.tooltip:
Shoot the underwater sun switch from the uninverted side of the temple with precise timing using a
sidehop over the water.

Casual.name: STT Underwater Sun Switch With Ice Arrows
Casual.text: STT Underwater Sun Switch With Ice Arrows
Casual.tooltip: Shoot the underwater sun switch from the uninverted side on top of an ice platform over the water.

Casual.name: STT Goron Bomb Jumps
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump on top of the sun blocks in the Eyegore room.

Casual.name: STT Bridge Crystal With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with explosives through the railing.

Casual.name: STT Bridge Crystal as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with Zora Boomerangs through the railing.

Casual.name: STT Bridge Crystal With Nothing
Casual.tooltip:
Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with as little as a single Deku Stick through the
railing, with a precise Jump Slash.

Casual.name: STT Bridge Crystal With Spin Attack
Casual.text: STT Bridge Crystal With Spin Attack
Casual.tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with a big Spin Attack.

Casual.name: STT Bridge Crystal With Ice Arrows
Casual.text: STT Bridge Crystal With Ice Arrows
Casual.tooltip:
Make yourself ice platforms with Ice Arrows to get to the area with the crystal switch in the
Eyegore room.

Casual.name: Shoot Twinmold
Casual.tooltip: Shoot Twinmold's tail with arrows instead of fighting with Giant's Mask.

Casual.name: ISTT Hookshot to Eyegore
Casual.tooltip: Shoot the Eyegore with Light Arrows from below, then hookshot to the chest.

Casual.name: ISTT Early Boss Key
Casual.tooltip: Drop down from the Dexihand either as Deku or with a sidehop and Jump Slash.

Casual.name: ISTT Lightless Boss Key
Casual.tooltip: Kill Gomess without Light Arrows by waiting for an opening when Gomess uses a special attack.

Casual.name: ISTT Updraft Recoil Flips
Casual.tooltip:
Recoil flip inside the tallest updraft to get to the Updraft Fire Ring chest,
and to the upstairs puzzle rooms.

Casual.name: ISTT Lobby Long Jump
Casual.tooltip: Long Jump to the Death Armos switch with explosives.

Casual.name: ISTT Lobby as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the Death Armos switch as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: ISTT as Giant
Casual.tooltip:
Navigate through the rooms of Inverted Stone Tower Temple as Giant Link with the gimmick Giant's
Mask Anywhere.

Casual.name: ISTT Updrafts Without Deku Mask
Casual.tooltip: Ride the updrafts up without Deku Mask.

Casual.name: ISTT Lava Room Gainer
Casual.tooltip: Gainer through the upsidedown lava room upstairs with a sufficiently tall transformation.

Casual.name: ISTT Lava Room With Explosives
Casual.tooltip: Recoil flip through the upsidedown lava room upstairs, or Goron Bomb Jump over the short wall.

Casual.name: ISTT Eyegore Bridge Recoil Flips
Casual.tooltip:
Recoil Flip from the bridge to either side, including towards the Dexihand,
to get launched into the updraft room.

Casual.name: ISTT Wizzrobe Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump to the Wizzrobe chest from below.

Casual.name: ISTT Hanging Explosive Dodging
Casual.tooltip:
Cross under the Eyegore bridge with the Deku Flowers by flying underneath the explosives,
and flying into them from behind to destroy them.

Casual.name: ISTT Poe Gap as FD
Casual.tooltip: Jump the gap with the Poes as Fierce Deity Link.

Casual.name: ISTT Eyegore Bridge to Dexihand as FD
Casual.text: ISTT Eyegore Bridge to Dexihand as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Self-explanatory jump. You may have to try several times before actually getting a proper jump off
the bridge.

Casual.name: ISTT Recoil Flip to Eyegore Bridge
Casual.text: ISTT Recoil Flip to Eyegore Bridge
Casual.tooltip: Recoil flip onto the Eyegore bridge from the passage leading out from the updraft room.

Casual.name: ISTT Death Armos Maze Chest Recoil Flip
Casual.text: ISTT Death Armos Maze Chest Recoil Flip
Casual.tooltip:
Skip needing Elegy or Hookshot for the fire ring in the maze by simply outrunning the returning
fire with a recoil flip.

Casual.name: ISTT Thin Bridge Rupees as Goron
Casual.text: ISTT Thin Bridge Rupees as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Collect the rupees from above by rolling over them as Goron Link.

Casual.name: ISTT Frozen Eye Chest Ledge With Nothing
Casual.text: ISTT Frozen Eye Chest Ledge With Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Jump to the ledge where the Stray Fairy chest spawns from above with no items.

Casual.name: ISTT Thin Bridge Three Blue Rupees as Zora
Casual.text: ISTT Thin Bridge Three Blue Rupees as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Collect the rupees through the wall with Zora Boomerangs.

Casual.name: ISTT Updraft Rupee Gainer
Casual.tooltip:
Get up to the ledge with the two red rupees in the updraft room with a Gainer and a tall
transformation.

Casual.name: ISTT Updraft Rupee Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.text: ISTT Updraft Rupee Goron Bomb Jump
Casual.tooltip: Get up to the ledge with the two red rupees in the updraft room with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Casual.name: ISTT Updraft Rupees as Zora
Casual.tooltip: Grab the rupees through the sun block with Zora Boomerangs.

Casual.name: Deku Trial as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Collect the Piece of Heart in Deku Trial without Deku Mask using some fine platforming as Fierce
Deity Link. You cannot actually complete the trial in this way.

Casual.name: Deku Trial With Hookshot Most Surfaces
Casual.text: Deku Trial With Hookshot Most Surfaces
Casual.tooltip: Hookshot your way across the trial. To get to the door, hookshot from the moving platform.

Casual.name: Goron Trial as FD
Casual.tooltip: Get through Goron Trial as Fierce Deity with sideways long jumps across long gaps.

Casual.name: Zora Trial as Human
Casual.tooltip:
Swim through the pipes as human. You need either Song of Time, Goron Mask,
or a death warp to escape the Heart Piece spot.

Casual.name: Link Trial With Sticks
Casual.tooltip: Kill the Dinolfos and defeat the Garo Master on the Moon with Deku Sticks.

Casual.name: Link Trial With Songs
Casual.tooltip:
Skip the challenges to unlock barred doors (and summon a ladder) on the Moon by playing songs at
specific Gossip Stones.

Casual.name: Link Trial as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Climb up past the Iron Knuckle as Fierce Deity Link without spawning the ladder.
Either jump from the Iron Knuckle chest, or perform a FD Gainer.

Casual.name: Termina Stump with No Items
Casual.tooltip: Slowly walk up the seam of the stump.

Casual.name: Ranch Tingle as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Climb the "Out of Bounds" ledge near the sign to Romani Ranch, and take Tingle down with a jump and
a Jump Slash.

Casual.name: Powder Keg Challenge Access as Zora/Adult Link
Casual.text: Powder Keg Challenge Access as Zora/Adult Link
Casual.tooltip: Shield the ice, then quickly climb up and drop hot spring water before the ice hits you again.

Casual.name: Climb Into Romani Ranch
Casual.tooltip: Climb through the boulder in Milk Road with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Casual.name: FD Jump into Ranch
Casual.tooltip:
Jump over the boulder in Milk Road as Fierce Deity. You can climb on some of the terrain near
Tingle.

Casual.name: Hookshot into Ranch
Casual.tooltip: Hookshot into Ranch with the gimmick Hookshot Any Surface.

Casual.name: Reverse Well With Climbing
Casual.tooltip: Enter the Well from Ikana Castle with Deku Mask and the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Casual.name: Garo Mask Skip
Casual.tooltip: Bug limit Ikana access with a Goron damage boost, a lot of slope climbing, and a recoil flip.

Casual.name: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as Goron
Casual.text: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as Goron
Casual.tooltip: Roll along the slope on the side as Goron to get to the upper chest in Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Casual.name: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as FD
Casual.text: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Jump along the slope to the side as Fierce Deity to get to the upper chest in Pirates' Fortress
Interior.

Casual.name: Goron Racetrack Access as FD
Casual.tooltip:
Long jump onto some grabbable terrain as Fierce Deity, then navigate the terrain to sidehop into
the racetrack loading zone from above.

Casual.name: Goron Racetrack Access With Hookshot/Climb Anywhere
Casual.text: Goron Racetrack Access With Hookshot/Climb Anywhere
Casual.tooltip: Get above the giant boulder in front of the Goron Racetrack, and sidehop into the loading zone.

Casual.name: Swamp Tingle With Climbing
Casual.tooltip:
Climb up the wall near Tingle with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick to get in range for a jump slash
take down.

Casual.name: Super Bowless Aliens
Casual.tooltip:
Mash pause for ~30 minutes (That's real time, not in-game time!) to complete Aliens Defense without
a bow or Sun's Song.

Casual.name: Low% Ocean Great Fairy
Casual.tooltip:
Get to the Fairy Fountain in Zora Cape with just Zora Mask and an explosive.
Extremely precise and requires a highly specific setup; not for the faint of heart!

Casual.name: Path to Snowhead with Nothing
Casual.tooltip: Mash jump slashes on the slopes on the left sides of the gaps.

Casual.name: Goron Race Without Magic
Casual.tooltip: Pray.

Casual.name: Road to Ikana Fences as Zora
Casual.text: Road to Ikana Fences as Zora
Casual.tooltip:
Get over the fences in Road to Ikana with highly precise Zora ground jump, jump slash,
damage boosts with bombs.

Casual.name: Ikana Canyon Access as FD With Real Bombchu
Casual.text: Ikana Canyon Access as FD With Real Bombchu
Casual.tooltip:
Damage boost off a Real Bombchu during the day in Road to Ikana to get on the boulder under the
ghost for the trick Ikana Canyon Access as FD.

Casual.name: WFT Twisted Recoil Flip
Casual.tooltip:
Get through the first room in Woodfall Temple with a highly technical sideways recoil flip as Zora
or Adult Link; probably one of the most challenging jumps in all of Casual Logic!

Casual.name: Stump Chest With Bats
Casual.tooltip: Damage boost off a nearby Bad Bat as Goron to get on top of the stump.

Casual.name: Twinmold Minimalism
Casual.tooltip: Kill Twinmold with just about any valid damaging hitbox, including just a Kokiri Sword.

Casual.name: Rock Sirloin Fireless
Casual.tooltip:
Get the Rock Sirloin without lighting the chandelier or the torches.
Break the chandelier pot closest to the Baby Goron side with Goron Spikes to get the chandelier
swaying slightly, then quickly break the chandelier pot with the Rock Sirloin inside with an
extremely precise Goron Spike Roll.

Casual.name: Lens Cave With Powder Keg Challenge
Casual.text: Lens Cave With Powder Keg Challenge
Casual.tooltip:
Bring the Powder Keg from Medigoron across the invisible platforms and into Lone Peak Shrine to
blow up the rock. Requires multiple outrageously precise Keg tosses on platforms that you probably
can't see; good luck!

Glitched.name: Faster Bank
Glitched.tooltip: Makes Bank 2 require nothing, and Bank 3 require any wallet.

Glitched.name: Scarecrow's Song
Glitched.tooltip: Using Scarecrow's Song where not normally required.

Glitched.name: Lensless Chests
Glitched.tooltip: Open invisible chests without the Lens of Truth.

Glitched.name: Long Jump
Glitched.tooltip: Drop a bomb behind you then use the recoil to jump a long distance.

Glitched.name: Run Through Poisoned Water
Glitched.tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by walking as Zora, or FD if it is enabled.

Glitched.name: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Glitched.text: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Glitched.tooltip: You can avoid being damaged by the fish by swimming sideways.

Glitched.name: Brute Force OSH Code
Glitched.tooltip: Removes Captain's Hat as requirement for Ocean Spider House mask code.

Glitched.name: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Glitched.text: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Glitched.tooltip: Play Elegy while on a block to ride the block up.

Glitched.name: Deku Playground Rupee Displacement
Glitched.tooltip:
Make the Rupees in Deku Playground fall by repeatedly using transformation masks, trade items,
or the Ocarina of Time.

Glitched.name: Bomb Hovering
Glitched.tooltip: The quintessential technique of any glitched randomizer of Majora's Mask.

Glitched.name: Enemy Interactions
Glitched.tooltip: Utilize enemies to your advantage. Not compatible with randomized enemies!

Glitched.name: Index Warp
Glitched.tooltip: Activate the Hidden Owl, and you can soar to other owl statues without hitting them.

Glitched.name: Goron Roll Item Grabs
Glitched.tooltip: Abuse the Goron Rolling hitbox to pick up freestanding rupees.

Glitched.name: Melt Sun Blocks With Water
Glitched.tooltip:
Simply pour water on the sun block in front of the Stone Tower Compass Chest and it will "melt"
away.

Glitched.name: Powder Keg Storage
Glitched.tooltip: Throw the Powder Keg from Keg Trial to the Hungry Goron, and then you may soar away with it.

Glitched.name: Deku Recoil
Glitched.tooltip: Slide off a ledge at high speed by shielding an explosion as Deku.

Glitched.name: Hookshot Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Clip out of bounds by using the Hookshot on a torch near a wall.

Glitched.name: Icicle Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Clip through walls by backwalking into an icicle.

Glitched.name: Ocarina Dive
Glitched.tooltip: Pull out Ocarina while swinging your sword over a ledge.

Glitched.name: Item Dive
Glitched.tooltip: While hovering over water, use the Ocarina or a cutscene item.

Glitched.name: SHT BK Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Clip through the door using the icicle.

Glitched.name: Poisoned Water as Goron
Glitched.tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by rolling as Goron. You aren't guaranteed to have enough health to make it.

Glitched.name: Lensless Jumping
Glitched.tooltip: Jump along invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Glitched.name: Lensless Walking
Glitched.tooltip: Lens of Truth will not be required to walk on invisible walkways.

Glitched.name: Bomber Guard Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Backflip over the Bomber Hideout Guard.

Glitched.name: Deku Guard Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Backflip over the deku guards from the fence.

Glitched.name: WFT 2nd Floor Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Hookshot to the torch in the main room.

Glitched.name: Kill Deku Shrine Big Octo
Glitched.tooltip:
Kill the Big Octo blocking the Deku Shrine before clearing Woodfall Temple with the Bow, Hookshot,
or Zora Mask.

Glitched.name: Deku Palace Bean Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Backflip onto the gate, then jump to the fence.

Glitched.name: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Skip
Glitched.tooltip:
Get on top of the falling ceiling with a sidehop and a jump slash, then ride the ceiling up to the
switch with a well timed arrow.

Glitched.name: Goron Bomb Jump
Glitched.tooltip: Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair.

Glitched.name: GBT Fireless
Glitched.tooltip: Navigate through the seesaw room without Fire Arrows.

Glitched.name: Ikana Canyon Iceless
Glitched.tooltip: Hookshot to the first stump from a precise position.

Glitched.name: SHT Zora Jumps
Glitched.tooltip: Jump from the bridge to the right side of the ice block. And jump to the 3rd locked door.

Glitched.name: Pinnacle Rock without Seahorse
Glitched.tooltip: Learn the path and enter Pinnacle Rock without the Seahorse.

Glitched.name: Jump Slash through One Sided Geometry
Glitched.text: Jump Slash through One Sided Geometry
Glitched.tooltip: Get the South Clock Town chest and the Doggy Racetrack Roof chest by jump slashing.

Glitched.name: Avoid Swamp Tree Bat
Glitched.tooltip: Kill the other bats, then climb around the final bat with precision.

Glitched.name: Goron Pound onto Ledges
Glitched.tooltip:
Use Goron Pound to get on the Swamp Tourist House roof, the ledge in Lulu's room,
and the straw roof in SCT.

Glitched.name: Zora Hall Scrub Ledge Climb
Glitched.tooltip: Climb onto the ledge in Lulu's room by navigating the furniture.

Glitched.name: Bowless Aliens
Glitched.tooltip: Pause and unpause until 5:15. Logic expects Sun's Song.

Glitched.name: Lensless Walls/Ceilings
Glitched.tooltip: Walk and shoot through false walls without Lens of Truth.

Glitched.name: Termina Stump with No Items
Glitched.tooltip: Slowly walk up the seam of the stump.

Glitched.name: ISTT Hookshot to Eyegore
Glitched.tooltip: Shoot the Eyegore with Light Arrows from below, then hookshot to the chest.

Glitched.name: Ocean Skulltulas without Fire Arrows
Glitched.tooltip:
At the entrance, simply hit the skulltula from a precise position.
In the storage room, get on the boat, slash the skulltula, then jump slash to get the token.

Glitched.name: SHT Jump to Stray Fairies
Glitched.tooltip: Jump to the two fairies in the SHT bridge room.

Glitched.name: Clever Ice Platforms
Glitched.tooltip:
Use ice platforms to your advantage in less obvious places, including shooting the underwater sun
switch in STT or for the GBT Boss Key.

Glitched.name: Inn Balcony Jump
Glitched.tooltip: Jump to the Inn balcony as Zora or Adult Link.

Glitched.name: Shoot Goht
Glitched.tooltip: Shoot Goht with Arrows.

Glitched.name: STT Water Tunnel as Human
Glitched.tooltip:
Swim through the underwater tunnel with a precise roll jump dive inside.
Hold A for the deepest possible dive.

Glitched.name: Clever Bombchu Usage
Glitched.tooltip: Use 10 packs of Bombchu for destroying beehives, Stray Fairy bubbles, and crystal switches in STT.

Glitched.name: FD Jumps
Glitched.tooltip: Leap across gaps only possible with the Allow Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere gimmick enabled.

Glitched.name: STT Eyegore Bridge Jumps
Glitched.tooltip:
Get on top of the railing from inside the bridge with a side hop and a jump slash.
Also, dolphin dive onto the bridge as Zora by swimming into either bridge supports with a precise
angle.

Glitched.name: Out of Bounds
Glitched.tooltip: Go out of bounds to get to difficult areas and loading zones.

Glitched.name: Inn Balcony with Cucco
Glitched.tooltip: Use a Cucco from the Bombers' Hide and Seek to jump to the Stock Pot Inn balcony.

Glitched.name: Zora Boomerang Through Walls
Glitched.tooltip: Use Zora Boomerangs through walls by hugging the wall at an angle.

Glitched.name: Ocarina Items
Glitched.tooltip:
Play other items like you would play the Ocarina. Also includes duplicating bottles over masks and
other inventory items.

Glitched.name: Action Swap
Glitched.tooltip: While holding an item and crouching, pull out another item and quickly interact with an actor.

Glitched.name: Long Bomb Hovers
Glitched.tooltip: Perform bomb hovers with many explosions.

Glitched.name: Time Stop
Glitched.tooltip: Delay triggered events by using a bottle in Link's hand immediately after shielding while targeting.

Glitched.name: Blast Mask Hovers
Glitched.tooltip: Get ISG in certain locations to perform Blast Mask-Only hovers.

Glitched.name: Recoil Flip Through Ice
Glitched.tooltip:
Recoil flip through ice in Termina Field, Twin Islands, and Snowhead Temple using only a shield or
Zora Mask.

Glitched.name: Deliver Deku Princess Without Deku Mask
Glitched.text: Deliver Deku Princess Without Deku Mask
Glitched.tooltip: Hover over the Deku King's chamber, and drop the Deku Princess from above.

Glitched.name: Day 1 Grave Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Sidehop into Composer Flat's grave at an angle.

Glitched.name: Restricted Items
Glitched.tooltip: Use normally unavailable items indoors by equipping and using an item on the frame of a ledge popup.

Glitched.name: STT BK Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Recoil flip through the door. Alternatively, hover to the loading zone to Twinmold.

Glitched.name: Jump Slash Take Downs
Glitched.tooltip: Hit things with mid-air jump slashes.

Glitched.name: Postman without Bunny Hood
Glitched.tooltip: Get exactly 10 seconds without using the Bunny Hood.

Glitched.name: Keeta with Minimal Items
Glitched.tooltip: Defeat Keeta without stunning him at all. A broken deku and some speed will be sufficient.

Glitched.name: STT Updrafts without Deku Mask
Glitched.tooltip: Ride the ISTT updrafts up one level, and cross the STT updrafts without Deku Mask.

Glitched.name: Path to Snowhead without Magic
Glitched.tooltip: Roll along the sides of the gaps.

Glitched.name: Shoot Twinmold
Glitched.tooltip: Shoot Twinmold's tail with arrows instead of fighting with Giant's Mask.

Glitched.name: SHT Pillar Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Shoot or bomb the snowballs, then jump down.

Glitched.name: GBT Iceless Boss Key
Glitched.tooltip: Jump to the Boss Key chest without an ice platform.

Glitched.name: ISTT Early Boss Key
Glitched.tooltip: Drop down from the Dexihand either as Deku or with a sidehop and jump slash.

Glitched.name: Lensless Climbing
Glitched.tooltip: Climb the Mountain Village invisible ladder without Lens of Truth.

Glitched.name: Gainer
Glitched.tooltip: Backflip away from a wall, then re-target the wall 1 frame later.

Glitched.name: GBT Iceless
Glitched.tooltip:
Reverse the water flow without Ice Arrows by using a Long Jump and a Gainer.
Pass through the waterwheel room with a precise jump out of the water.

Glitched.name: Zora Jar Game with Explosives
Glitched.tooltip:
Blow up all the pots on the same frame. Can be "buffered" with Ocarina,
or simply done with a well-timed Blast Mask explosion combined with a bomb.

Glitched.name: Keaton Grass Small Spin
Glitched.tooltip: Hit all 9 keaton bushes with a small sword and small spin attack.

Glitched.name: GBT Goron Waterwheel
Glitched.tooltip: Skip the first yellow turnkey with a precise Goron roll.

Glitched.name: Powder Kegs as Explosives
Glitched.tooltip: Use Powder Kegs in place of other explosives.

Glitched.name: Recoil Flip
Glitched.tooltip: Cross gaps by shielding an explosion during a backflip.

Glitched.name: ISTT Lightless Boss Key
Glitched.tooltip: Kill Gomess without Light Arrows by waiting for an opening when Gomess uses a special attack.

Glitched.name: FD Difficult Jumps
Glitched.tooltip:
Perform the most difficult jumps, only possible with the Allow Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere gimmick
enabled.

Glitched.name: Snowball Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Backflip past the large snowballs blocking the way in Path to Mountain Village.

Glitched.name: SHT Fireless
Glitched.tooltip:
Thaw ice with precise arrow shots through torches, raise the pillar with Flame Storage,
and activate the switch in the Compass room by rolling into the ice.

Glitched.name: Big Octo Skip
Glitched.tooltip:
Get past the left side Big Octo with a precise jump and Deku voiding invulnerability frames,
or get past the right side Big Octo with a Goron roll from above.

Glitched.name: Powder Keg Challenge with Hot Spring Water
Glitched.text: Powder Keg Challenge with Hot Spring Water
Glitched.tooltip:
Link can use Hot Spring Water to melt the ice in front of Medigoron's cave with ISG.
Zora and Fierce Deity can also do it without ISG.

Glitched.name: GBT Cutscene Diving
Glitched.tooltip:
Freeze and unfreeze the water blocking the green pump room to dive to the deeper parts of the
temple without Zora Mask.

Glitched.name: Harder Long Jumps
Glitched.tooltip:
Includes long jumping sideways to grab awkward ledges, and long jumping as Zora or Fierce Deity
with Blast Mask.

Glitched.name: Difficult Goron Spike Rolls
Glitched.tooltip: Use precise movement with Goron Spikes to get to hard-to-reach areas.

Glitched.name: GBT Hookless Exit
Glitched.tooltip: Leave Great Bay Temple without Hookshot by carefully negotiating with the turtle's geometry.

Glitched.name: WFT Bow Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Open the barred doors leading to the pre-boss room of Woodfall Temple with a lit Deku Stick.

Glitched.name: Remote Hookshot
Glitched.tooltip: "Store" a hookshot target by drinking milk after pulling hookshot holding an empty bottle.

Glitched.name: Harder Enemy Interactions
Glitched.tooltip: Utilize enemies to perform difficult tricks. Not compatible with randomized enemies!

Glitched.name: Superslide
Glitched.tooltip: Preserve recoil momentum after taking damage during roll invulnerability frames.

Glitched.name: Weirdshot
Glitched.tooltip: Use Hookshot during the distortion caused by rolling into an explosion.

Glitched.name: WFT Gekko Quick Kill
Glitched.tooltip: Kill the WFT Gekko with bombs and jump slashing.

Glitched.name: WFT Megapound
Glitched.tooltip:
During Deku void invulnerability frames, get hit by an explosion while Goron Pounding to get to the
2nd floor of Woodfall Temple.

Glitched.name: Precise Zora Jumps
Glitched.tooltip: Precise Zora Jumps outside of Snowhead Temple.

Glitched.name: WFT BK Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Skip the boss key for Woodfall Temple.

Glitched.name: Zora Clips
Glitched.tooltip: Clip into ledges and walls as Zora.

Glitched.name: Open Upside-Down Chests
Glitched.tooltip: Open chests in ISTT from STT, and vice-versa, with hovering.

Glitched.name: STT Sun Block Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Clip past the sun block in front of the Compass Chest in STT and ISTT.

Glitched.name: Equip Swap
Glitched.tooltip: Equip items over the trade item slot, or the 6th bottle slot.

Glitched.name: STT Underwater Sun Switch Snipe
Glitched.tooltip: Hit the underwater sun switch in STT with a Light Arrow shot off a sidehop.

Glitched.name: Extremely Long Bomb Hovers
Glitched.tooltip:
Bomb hovers with many, many explosives, usually only possible with Blast Mask (Instant Blast Mask
Cooldown recommended!)

Glitched.name: Path to Snowhead With Nothing
Glitched.tooltip: Get through Path to Snowhead by mashing jump slashes on the edges of the gaps.

Glitched.name: Mountain Village Early Seamwalk
Glitched.tooltip: Carefully walk up the slope and around the ice blocking Path to Mountain Village.

Glitched.name: Epona Push
Glitched.tooltip: Get pushed by Epona's idle animation and amplifying the collision interaction with pause buffering.

Glitched.name: Beneath the Well Sun Block Clip
Glitched.text: Beneath the Well Sun Block Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Clip through the sun block at the end of Beneath the Well with bombs and Zora Mask or FD Anywhere.

Glitched.name: Zora Hall Doors as Human
Glitched.tooltip: Get past the Zoras in front of Lulu's room and Evan's room with a twisted backflip.

Glitched.name: Honey and Darling Three Days without Bow
Glitched.text: Honey and Darling Three Days without Bow
Glitched.tooltip:
Prevent yourself by getting kicked out of the minigame by pause buffering,
and complete the day 2 minigame during the transition to Day 3.

Glitched.name: Flip Stone Tower Without Elegy
Glitched.tooltip: Shoot a Light Arrow at the red emblem and roll over the correct switch nearly simultaneously.

Glitched.name: Ikana Castle Seamwalk
Glitched.tooltip: Seamwalk to the top of the castle from the castle's corner on the right side.

Glitched.name: Enter Pirates' Fortress Sewers as Deku
Glitched.text: Enter Pirates' Fortress Sewers as Deku
Glitched.tooltip: Clip into the Sewers from behind by voiding into a water stream as Deku.

Glitched.name: Ignore Fire Rings
Glitched.tooltip: Cleverly open chests surrounded by fire.

Glitched.name: Momentary Anti-Gravity
Glitched.tooltip: Slide into the corner of a roof to obtain momentary anti-gravity.

Glitched.name: Day 2 Grave Clip
Glitched.tooltip:
Get on top of the Day 2 Grave, then slide inside by reading the grave from above.
Or simply unload the grave.

Glitched.name: Day 3 Grave Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Ocarina dive into the grave from above, or read the grave from above with extreme precision.

Glitched.name: Leever Hover
Glitched.tooltip: Get into Great Bay Coast early with only a shield.

Glitched.name: Termina Field Boulder Clip
Glitched.tooltip: Get in grottos underneath boulders in Termina Field during a day/night transition.

Glitched.name: Business Scrub Flower Theft
Glitched.tooltip: Damage boost into flowers occupied by business scrubs.

Glitched.name: GBT BK Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Clip out of bounds as Zora and simply swim to the unloaded boss door, or hover there instead.

Glitched.name: Guess Bomber Code
Glitched.tooltip: 120 combinations.

Glitched.name: Bio Baba Hive Luck
Glitched.tooltip: Hope the item lands on a lilypad.

Glitched.name: Lullaby Skip
Glitched.tooltip: Skip playing Goron Lullaby to enter Snowhead Temple using either Goron Spikes or a HESS.

Glitched.name: Dog Race Luck
Glitched.tooltip: Removes Mask of Truth as a requirement for Dog Race.

Glitched.name: WFT Recoil Jump
Glitched.tooltip: Jump to WFT 2nd Floor as human with only a bomb and a Bombchu.

Glitched.name: Weirdshot Off a Powder Keg Explosion
Glitched.text: Weirdshot Off a Powder Keg Explosion
Glitched.tooltip: Exactly as the trick name describes. Try your best to not crash your game trying this!

Glitched.name: Recoil Flip Off Enemies
Glitched.tooltip: Recoil flip off enemies. Very precise!

options.name: DirectToCredits
options.tooltip:
Once the custom victory condition(s) is/are fulfilled, begin the credits as soon as possible.
Otherwise, you must fulfill the condition(s) and then defeat Majora.

options.name: CantFightMajora
options.tooltip:
When enabled, speaking to the Moon Child who is wearing Majora's Mask will send you back in time if
you haven't fufilled the victory condition(s). When disabled, defeating Majora will send you back
in time if you haven't fulfilled the victory condition(s).

options.name: Fairies
options.tooltip: Have 15 of each dungeon stray fairy.

options.name: SkullTokens
options.tooltip: Have 30 of each type of skulltula token.

options.name: NonTransformationMasks
options.tooltip: Have all 20 non-transformation masks.

options.name: TransformationMasks
options.tooltip: Have all 4 transformation masks.

options.name: Notebook
options.tooltip: Have all the notebook entries.

options.name: Hearts
options.tooltip: Have all 20 hearts.

options.name: OneBossRemains
options.tooltip: Have one of the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

options.name: TwoBossRemains
options.tooltip: Have two of the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

options.name: ThreeBossRemains
options.tooltip: Have three of the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

options.name: FourBossRemains
options.tooltip: Have all the boss remains. Only the highest boss remain victory condition enabled will be used.

options.name: Purchases
options.tooltip: Prices for item purchases will be randomized.

options.name: Minigames
options.tooltip: Prices for minigames will be randomized.

options.name: Misc
options.tooltip: Prices for other miscellaneous spending will be randomized.

options.name: AccountForRoyalWallet
options.tooltip:
Price randomization will range from 1-999 instead of 1-500. Any shuffled or non-randomized price
will double.

options.name: ShuffleOnly
options.tooltip:
Prices will only be shuffled among each other. Must enable Puchases, Minigames or Misc for this
setting to have any effect.

options.name: GreatFairyRewards
options.tooltip:
Boss Remains will be placed on the reward for collecting 15 stray fairies of their dungeon.
Great Fairy Rewards must be randomized for this to take effect.

options.name: ShuffleOnly
options.tooltip:
Boss Remains will be shuffled among each other. You still need to randomize them in the Item
Randomization tab.

options.name: KeepWithinTemples
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into any temple.

options.name: KeepWithinArea
options.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into a location in or near the
temple its boss is in.

options.name: KeepWithinOverworld
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into an overworld location.

options.name: Blitz1
options.tooltip:
Start with 1 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temple with that boss will be forced
to be junk.

options.name: Blitz2
options.tooltip:
Start with 2 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temples with those bosses will be
forced to be junk.

options.name: Blitz3
options.tooltip:
Start with 3 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temples with those bosses will be
forced to be junk.

options.name: Blitz4
options.tooltip: Start with all boss remains. Locations in and after temples will be forced to be junk.

options.name: DoorsOpen
options.tooltip:
Boss doors will always be open. Boss Keys in the item pool will be replaced with other items.
Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.

options.name: GreatFairyRewards
options.tooltip:
Boss Keys will be placed on the reward for collecting 15 stray fairies of their dungeon.
Great Fairy Rewards must be randomized for this to take effect.

options.name: KeepWithinTemples
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into any temple.

options.name: KeepWithinArea
options.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into a location in or near the temple
it's used in.

options.name: KeepWithinOverworld
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into an overworld location.

options.name: KeepThroughTime
options.tooltip: Boss Keys will go back in time with Link.

options.name: DoorsOpen
options.tooltip:
Small Key doors will always be open. Small Keys in the item pool will be replaced with other items.
Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.

options.name: KeepWithinTemples
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into any temple.

options.name: KeepWithinArea
options.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into a location in or near the temple
they're used in.

options.name: KeepWithinOverworld
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into an overworld location.

options.name: KeepThroughTime
options.tooltip: Small Keys will go back in time with Link. Any used Small Keys will return to Link's inventory.

options.name: ChestsOnly
options.tooltip:
Stray Fairies in the item pool will be replaced with other items.
Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.
Non-chest fairies (roaming, bubbles, beehives, etc.) are removed.
Chests that ordinarily have a Stray Fairy will behave like normal chests.

options.name: KeepWithinTemples
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into any temple.

options.name: KeepWithinArea
options.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into a location in or near the
fairy fountain they originate from.

options.name: KeepWithinOverworld
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into an overworld location.

options.name: KeepWithinTemples
options.tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Dungeon Maps and Compasses into any temple.

options.name: KeepWithinArea
options.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Dungeon Maps and Compasses into a location in or
near the temple they're for.

options.name: KeepWithinOverworld
options.tooltip:
Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Dungeon Maps and Compasses into an overworld
location.

options.name: MapRevealsLocation
options.tooltip: Finding a Dungeon Map will tell you the location of the dungeon.

options.name: CompassRevealsBoss
options.tooltip: Finding a Compass will tell you which boss is in the dungeon.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.RandomizeDungeonEntrances
settings.tooltip:
Enable randomization of dungeon entrances.

Stone Tower Temple is always vanilla, but Inverted Stone Tower Temple is randomized.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.AddSongs
settings.tooltip: Enable songs being placed among items in the randomization pool.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.StartingItemMode
settings.tooltip:
Select a starting item mode:

None - You will not start with any randomized starting items.
Random - You will start with randomized starting items.
Allow Temporary Items - You will start with randomized starting items including Keg, Magic Bean and Bottles with X.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.RandomizeBossRooms
settings.tooltip: Enable randomization of boss rooms. The boss door texture will match the boss behind the door.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.RandomizeEnemies
settings.tooltip: Enable randomization of enemies. May cause softlocks in some circumstances, use at your own risk.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.RequiredBossRemains
settings.tooltip: Set the number of Boss Remains required to proceed through the final Giants cutscene.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ProgressiveUpgrades
settings.tooltip:
Enable swords, wallets, magic, bomb bags, quivers and the Goron Lullaby to be found in the intended
order.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.MovementMode
settings.tooltip:
Select a movement modifier:

- Default: No movement modifier.
- High speed: Link moves at a much higher velocity.
- Super low gravity: Link can jump very high.
- Low gravity: Link can jump high.
- High gravity: Link can barely jump.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FloorType
settings.tooltip:
Select a floortype for every floor ingame:

- Default: Vanilla floortypes.
- Sand: Link sinks slowly into every floor, affecting movement speed.
- Ice: Every floor is slippery.
- Snow: Similar to sand.
- Random: Any random floortypes of the above.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ContinuousDekuHopping
settings.tooltip: Press A while hopping across water to keep hopping.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.HookshotAnySurface
settings.tooltip: Hookshot can hook to any surface.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ClimbMostSurfaces
settings.tooltip: Link can climb most surfaces.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.IronGoron
settings.tooltip: Goron Link will sink in water instead of drowning.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ClockSpeed
settings.tooltip: Modify the speed of time.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.AutoInvert
settings.tooltip: Auto-invert time at the start of a cycle.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.HideClock
settings.tooltip: Clock UI will be hidden.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TrapAmount
settings.tooltip: Amount of ice traps to be added to pool by replacing junk items.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TrapAppearance
settings.tooltip: Appearance of ice traps in pool for world models.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TrapQuirks
settings.tooltip: Ice traps will behave slightly differently from other items in certain situations.

keys.name: Ice
keys.tooltip: Ice traps freeze the player in ice, dealing damage over a few seconds or voiding Zora.

keys.name: Bomb
keys.tooltip: Bomb traps explode in the player's position, dealing damage and knocking them back.

keys.name: Rupoor
keys.tooltip: Rupoors take 10 rupees from your wallet.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.DamageMode
settings.tooltip:
Select a damage mode, affecting how much damage Link takes:

- Default: Link takes normal damage.
- 2x: Link takes double damage.
- 4x: Link takes quadruple damage.
- 1-hit KO: Any damage kills Link.
- Doom: Hardcore mode. Link's hearts are slowly being drained continuously.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.DamageEffect
settings.tooltip:
Select an effect to occur whenever Link is being damaged:

- Default: Vanilla effects occur.
- Fire: All damage burns Link.
- Ice: All damage freezes Link.
- Shock: All damage shocks link.
- Knockdown: All damage knocks Link down.
- Random: Any random effect of the above.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.DeathMoonCrash
settings.tooltip: Dying causes the moon to crash, with all that that implies.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FewerHealthDrops
settings.tooltip:
Recovery Hearts will not drop, and re-acquiring random items will turn into Green Rupees instead.
Fairies will not heal except on death.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ByoAmmo
settings.tooltip:
Arrows, Bombs, and Bombchu will not be provided for minigames. You must bring your own.
Logic Modes other than No Logic will account for this.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageOnEpona
settings.tooltip: Instead of being immune to damage while riding Epona, Link will take damage and be thrown off.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageWhileShielding
settings.tooltip: Link will take damage when being hit on his shield, and can't recoil off damage to the shield.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromVoid
settings.tooltip: Link will take damage when falling into voids or voiding out in water.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromGorons
settings.tooltip: Link will take damage when being hit by Gorons during the Goron Race.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromGibdosFaster
settings.tooltip: Gibdos will deal damage immediately after grabbing Link.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageGettingCaught
settings.tooltip:
Getting thrown out after being caught by guards will deal damage.
Being thrown out after getting the reward from the Imprisoned Monkey will not deal damage.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromDog
settings.tooltip: Dogs will damage Deku Link.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TakeDamageFromDexihands
settings.tooltip: Link will take damage from Dexihands.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.BlastMaskCooldown
settings.tooltip: Adjust the cooldown timer after using the Blast Mask.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.NutandStickDrops
settings.tooltip:
Adds Deku nuts and Deku sticks to drop tables in the field:

- Default: No change, vanilla behavior.
- Light: one stick and nut 1/16 chance termina bush.
- Medium: More nuts, twice the chance
- Extra: More sticks, more nuts, more drop locations.
- Mayhem: You're crazy in the coconut!

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OcarinaUnderwater
settings.tooltip: Enable using the ocarina underwater.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.EnableSunsSong
settings.tooltip:
Enable using the Sun's Song, which speeds up time to 400 units per frame (normal time speed is 3
units per frame) until dawn or dusk or a loading zone.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FreeScarecrow
settings.tooltip: Spawn scarecrow automatically when using ocarina if within range.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.AllowFierceDeityAnywhere
settings.tooltip:
Allow the Fierce Deity's Mask to be used anywhere. Also addresses some softlocks caused by Fierce
Deity.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.GiantMaskAnywhere
settings.tooltip: Allows the Giant's Mask to be used anywhere with a high enough (or no) ceiling.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.InstantTransform
settings.tooltip:
Transforming using Deku Mask, Goron Mask, Zora Mask and Fierce Deity's Mask will be almost instant.
These items can no longer be used as "cutscene items".

settings.name: GameplaySettings.BombArrows
settings.tooltip: Use a bomb while an arrow is out when using the bow to attach the bomb to the tip of the arrow.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.VanillaMoonTrialAccess
settings.tooltip:
Entering the trials on the Moon will require masks, as per the vanilla behavior,
but this is not considered by logic. Without this enabled, the trials will not require any masks to
enter.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.Character
settings.tooltip: Select a character model to replace Link's default model.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SpeedupDampe
settings.tooltip: Change Dampe ghost flames to always have two on the ground floor and one up the ladder.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SpeedupLabFish
settings.tooltip: Change Lab Fish to only need to be fed one fish.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SpeedupBank
settings.tooltip:
Change the Bank reward thresholds to 200/500/1000 instead of 200/1000/5000.
Also reduces maximum bank capacity from 5000 to 1000.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SpeedupBeavers
settings.tooltip: Modify Beavers to not have to race the younger beaver.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SpeedupDogRace
settings.tooltip: Make Gold Dog always win if you have the Mask of Truth.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.DoubleArcheryRewards
settings.tooltip: Grant both archery rewards with a sufficient score.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SpeedupBabyCuccos
settings.tooltip: Makes the location of baby cuccos show on the minimap.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.HintsIndicateImportance
settings.tooltip: Location hints indicate the importance of the item.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.MixGossipAndGaroHints
settings.tooltip: Garo hints distribution and gossip hint distribution will be mixed together.

settings.name: Web.HintPriorities
settings.tooltip: Customize hint priority tiers for competitive hint generation

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideHintPriorities
settings.tooltip:
If any locations are provided, this list will be used exclusively for determining hint priorities.
Settings are not taken into account, but non-randomized and junked locations will not be hinted.
The higher a location appears in this list, the higher its priority.
Locations with the same priority will be chosen randomly. If a location should combine with another
location, all the combined locations should be added.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideImportanceIndicatorTiers
settings.tooltip: Make chosen tiers of hints indicate their importance.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideHintItemCaps
settings.tooltip:
The number (if non-zero) indicates how many of the locations in the tier will be hinted,
and the rest will be forced to be junk.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.RemainsHint
settings.tooltip:
At the entrance to the Clock Tower Interior, Tatl will prompt to speak and will tell you the
regions where the Boss Remains are located.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OathHint
settings.tooltip:
When you take the boss warp after defeating a temple boss, if you have enough boss remains to go to the moon and do not have Oath to Order then a cutscene will play in which the Giants reveal to you the region where the Oath to Order is located.

If Mix Songs With Items is disabled, they will instead reveal the region of the Powder Keg, Captain's Hat, Mirror Shield, Deku Mask, Goron Mask or Zora Mask, depending on where the Oath to Order is.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FairyAndSkullHint
settings.tooltip:
The cursed man in the Swamp Spider House, and the Green Shirt Man in the Ocean Spider House will tell you the regions of the remaining spider tokens. The Green Shirt Man in the Ocean Spider House will appear there when you blow up the entrance wall.

Each fairy fountain (including Clock Town) will tell you the regions of the remaining Stray Fairies.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.GossipHintStyle
settings.tooltip:
Select a Gossip Stone hint style

- Default: Vanilla Gossip Stone hints.
- Random: Hints will contain locations of random items.
- Relevant: Hints will contain locations of items loosely related to the vanilla hint or the area.
- Competitive: Guaranteed hints about time-consuming checks, and hints regarding importance or non-importance of regions

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FreeHints
settings.tooltip: Enable reading gossip stone hints without requiring the Mask of Truth.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ClearHints
settings.tooltip: Gossip stone hints will give clear item and location names.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ImportanceCount
settings.tooltip:
Gossip stone hints that normally give a Way of the Hero hint will instead tell you the number of
important items in the region. Foolish hints will say zero important items.
Foolish Except The Song hints will say one important song.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfRequiredGossipHints
settings.tooltip: Set the number of Way of the Hero hints that will appear on Gossip Stones.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfNonRequiredGossipHints
settings.tooltip: Set the number of Foolish hints that will appear on Gossip Stones.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideMaxNumberOfClockTownGossipHints
settings.text: Override Max Clock Town Gossip Hints
settings.tooltip:
Set the maximum number of Way of the Hero hints on Gossip Stones that can be for a Clock Town
region (including Laundry Pool).

settings.name: GameplaySettings.GaroHintStyle
settings.tooltip:
Select a Garo hint style

- Default: Vanilla Garo hints.
- Random: Hints will contain locations of random items.
- Relevant: Hints will contain locations of items loosely related to the vanilla hint or the area.
- Competitive: Guaranteed hints about time-consuming checks, and hints regarding importance or non-importance of regions.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FreeGaroHints
settings.tooltip: Enable fighting Garos by speaking to Tatl instead of wearing the Garo's Mask.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ClearGaroHints
settings.tooltip: Garo hints will give clear item and location names.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ImportanceCountGaro
settings.tooltip:
Garo hints that normally give a Way of the Hero hint will instead tell you the number of important
items in the region. Foolish hints will say zero important items.
Foolish Except The Song hints will say one important song.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfRequiredGaroHints
settings.tooltip: Set the number of Way of the Hero hints that will appear on Garos.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideNumberOfNonRequiredGaroHints
settings.tooltip: Set the number of Foolish hints that will appear on Garos.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.OverrideMaxNumberOfClockTownGaroHints
settings.text: Override Max Clock Town Garo Hints
settings.tooltip:
Set the maximum number of Way of the Hero hints on Garos that can be for a Clock Town region
(including Laundry Pool).

settings.name: GameplaySettings.CritWiggleDisable
settings.tooltip: Disable crit wiggle movement modification when 1 heart of health or less.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.QuickTextEnabled
settings.tooltip: Enable quick text. Dialogs are fast-forwarded to choices/end of dialog.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FastPush
settings.tooltip: Increase the speed of pushing and pulling blocks and faucets.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.CloseCows
settings.tooltip:
When playing Epona's Song for a group of cows, the closest cow will respond,
instead of the default behavior.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.EnablePictoboxSubject
settings.tooltip: Display extra text showing which type of picture was captured by the Pictobox.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.LenientGoronSpikes
settings.tooltip: Goron spikes can charge midair and keep their charge. Minimum speed for goron spikes is removed.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TargetHealthBar
settings.tooltip: Targeting an enemy shows their health bar.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FillWallet
settings.tooltip: Fills wallet with max rupees upon finding a wallet upgrade.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.HiddenRupeesSparkle
settings.tooltip: Hit Tags and Invisible Rupees will emit a sparkle.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SaferGlitches
settings.tooltip:
Makes it safer to use glitches:
- Prevents HESS crash
- Prevents Weirdshot crash
- Prevents Action Swap crash
- Prevents Song of Double Time softlock during 0th or 4th day
- Prevents Tatl text softlock on 0th of 4th day
- Prevents 0th day file deletion
- Prevents hookslide crash
- Prevents softlocks when using Remote Hookshot
- Prevents 0th day Goron Bow crash
- Applies safety fixes for Fierce Deity even if Fierce Deity Anywhere is not enabled
- Index warp no longer crashes or softlocks (but you won't be able to use it to access the Debug Menu)
- Prevents softlocks when interrupting mask transformations
- Mayor is removed on 4th day
- Deku Playground Employees are removed on 4th day
- Prevents Gossip Stone time from crashing on 4th day
- Prevents Town Shooting Gallery from crashing on 0th day and 4th day

settings.name: GameplaySettings.EasyFrameByFrame
settings.tooltip: Hold Start while unpausing to pause again after one frame passes.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ChestGameMinimap
settings.tooltip:
Draws a minimap during the Treasure Chest Game if you have the Map of Clock Town:

- Off: No minimap, default vanilla behaviour.
- Minimal: Minimap is displayed, blocks appear on minimap when triggered.
- Conditional Spoiler: Minimal behaviour, and if the Mask of Truth is aquired along with Map of Clock Town, spoil the maze layout.
- Spoiler: Only Map of Clock Town needed to spoil the maze layout.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.UpdateShopAppearance
settings.tooltip: Shops models and text will be updated to match the item they give.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.UpdateChests
settings.tooltip: Chest appearance will be updated to match the item they contain.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.UpdateWorldModels
settings.tooltip:
Show world models as their actual item instead of the original item.
This includes Pieces of Heart, Heart Containers, Skulltula Tokens, Stray Fairies,
Moon's Tear and the Seahorse.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.UpdateNPCText
settings.tooltip: NPC text that refers to items and their locations will be updated.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.PreventDowngrades
settings.tooltip: Downgrading items will be prevented.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FixEponaSword
settings.tooltip:
Change Epona's B button behavior to prevent you from losing your sword if you don't have a bow.
May affect vanilla glitches that use Epona's B button.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.QuestItemStorage
settings.tooltip:
Enable Quest Item Storage, which allows for storing multiple quest items in their dedicated
inventory slot. Quest items will also always be consumed when used.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.KeepQuestTradeThroughTime
settings.tooltip: Quest items will return to your inventory after Song of Time.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ArrowCycling
settings.tooltip: Cycle through arrow types when pressing R while an arrow is out when using the bow.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.ElegySpeedup
settings.tooltip: Applies various Elegy of Emptiness speedups.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.BombchuDrops
settings.tooltip:
If you have found Bombchu, then any random Bomb drop or fixed non-randomized Bomb drop will have a
chance to drop Bombchu instead. Where relevant, Bombchu packs of 1 and 5 will be in logic in
addition to packs of 10.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.TolerantGossipStones
settings.tooltip: The angle at which Gossip Stones can be read will be more tolerant.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.FairyMaskShimmer
settings.tooltip: Nearby stray fairies, even randomized ones, will cause the Great Fairy Mask to shimmer.

settings.name: GameplaySettings.SkulltulaTokenSounds
settings.tooltip: Nearby skulltula tokens, even randomized ones, will emit a spider crawling sound.

options.name: BlastMaskThief
options.tooltip: You don't have to wait for Sakon to leave.

options.name: BoatArchery
options.tooltip: The minigame will end as soon as you have the required 20 points.

options.name: FishermanGame
options.tooltip: The minigame will end as soon as you have the required 20 points.

options.name: MilkBarPerformance
options.tooltip: Replaying of the music is shortened.

options.name: HungryGoron
options.tooltip: The Hungry Goron doesn't interrupt you when you approach, and you don't have to watch him roll away.

options.name: TatlInterrupts
options.tooltip: Remove most instances of Tatl interrupting your gameplay.

options.name: FasterBankText
options.tooltip: Skips the irrelevant bank text. Allows using Z/R to set deposit/withdraw amount to min/max.

options.name: GoronVillageOwl
options.tooltip:
The owl in Goron Village will no longer trigger dialog when you approach.
You must target it and talk to it if you want it to reveal the path.

options.name: AutomaticCredits
options.tooltip: The dialog of the credits will proceed automatically.

options.name: PrincessDelivery
options.tooltip: The cutscene when delivering the Deku Princess will be skipped.

options.name: ShortChestOpening
options.tooltip: All chests will open using the short animation.

options.name: SunMask
options.tooltip: Shorten various aspects of recovering the Sun Mask.

options.name: Tingle
options.tooltip: You don't have to watch Tingle fall, and his text is shortened.

options.name: JimRunning
options.tooltip: You don't have to watch Jim run away after using the Bombers' code.

options.name: Kotake
options.tooltip:
You don't have to watch Kotake fly into the woods, and don't have to watch her fly away after
giving you an item.

options.name: HoldAText
options.tooltip: Hold A to automatically advance text.

options.name: EverythingElse
options.tooltip: Various cutscenes are skipped or otherwise shortened.

options.name: Odolwa
options.tooltip: Odolwa is ready to fight you right away.

options.name: Goht
options.tooltip: Link doesn't look around in surprise when you enter Goht's room.

options.name: Gyorg
options.tooltip: Gyorg is ready to fight you right away.

options.name: Twinmold
options.tooltip: Twinmold is ready to fight you right away.

options.name: Majora
options.tooltip: Majora is ready to fight you right away.

options.name: Wart
options.tooltip: You don't have to look at Wart to get him down from the ceiling. It spawns on the ground.

options.name: IgosDuIkana
options.tooltip: Igos du Ikana and his henchmen are ready to fight you right away.

options.name: Gomess
options.tooltip: Gomess and his bats are ready to fight you right away.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.HeartsSelection
settings.tooltip: Hearts color selection used for HUD color override.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.MagicSelection
settings.tooltip: Magic color selection used for HUD color override.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.ShiftHueMiscUI
settings.tooltip: Shifts the color of miscellaneous UI elements.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.TatlColorSchema
settings.tooltip: Select a color scheme to replace Tatl's default color scheme.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.EnableHoldZTargeting
settings.tooltip: Default Z-Targeting style to Hold.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.KeepPictoboxAntialiasing
settings.tooltip: Remove anti-aliasing from the Pictobox pictures, which is what makes Pictobox on emulator so slow.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.RainbowTunic
settings.tooltip: Link's tunic color will slowly cycle its hue.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.BombTrapsRandomizeTunicColor
settings.tooltip: When you find a Bomb Trap, Link's tunic will randomly change color.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.CameraStyle
settings.tooltip:
Select a camera style.

- Default: Vanilla camera.
- Responsive: Link's movement will always be relative to the direction the camera is facing.
- Instant: When Z-Targeting to move the camera behind Link, it will do it very quickly. Camera panning when climbing ledges is also sped up.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.RandomizeSounds
settings.tooltip: Randomize sound effects that are played throughout the game.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.EnableNightBGM
settings.tooltip:
Enables playing daytime Background music during nighttime in the field.
(Clocktown night music can be weird)

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.DisableCombatMusic
settings.tooltip: Disables combat music around all regular (non boss or miniboss) enemies in the game.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.RemoveMinorMusic
settings.tooltip:
Minor music such as indoors and grottos will not play. Background music that is already playing
will instead continue.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.ShowTrackName
settings.tooltip:
When a new track starts playing in-game, show the name of the track at the bottom left of the
screen.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.DisableFanfares
settings.tooltip: Replace item fanfares and swamp shooting gallery fanfares with sound effects.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.Music
settings.tooltip:
Select a music option

- Default: Vanilla background music.
- None: No background music.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.MusicLuckRollChance
settings.tooltip:
Music Rando comes with a chance to accept a song from outside of its categories.
- This controls the percentage chance of a Luck Roll allowing out-of-category music placement
- This is per specific slot+song check
- Only songs with their first category being a general category (0-16) are Luck Rollable.

settings.name: CosmeticSettings.LowHealthSFX
settings.tooltip:
Select a Low Health SFX setting:

- Default: Vanilla sound.
- Disabled: No sound will play.
- Random: a random SFX will be chosen.
- Specific SFX: a specific SFX will play as the low health sfx.
